sections.title: Prologue: November 29–30
sections.content:
# Prologue

The Prologue of Trails of Cold Steel II picks up one month after the devastating Erebonian Civil War outbreak that ended the first game. Rean Schwarzer awakens alone in the Eisengard Mountains near Ymir, separated from his classmates. This tutorial chapter reintroduces you to the combat system and sets the stage for the journey to reunite Class VII.

## November 29 — Eisengard Range

<!-- checkpoint: eisengard-start | Begin Eisengard Descent -->

### Starting Out

You begin in the snowy Eisengard Mountain Canyon. The path is mostly linear with side branches leading to treasure.

**Difficulty Selection:** Choose from Easy, Normal, Hard, or Nightmare. If you have a Clear Save from Trails of Cold Steel I, you'll receive transfer bonuses including items and Sepith based on your old save's level and rank.

> 🏆 **Achievement: Conquering Hero** — Complete the game on Hard difficulty or above. **Banisher of Nightmares** — Complete on Nightmare. Difficulty trophies stack, so Nightmare earns both.

After the opening cinematic summarizing the civil war, you gain control of **Rean**.

### Navigation Tutorial

The game introduces saving, Cross-Save, and the Navigation Menu (press Square to highlight objectives). Get into the habit of pressing Square whenever you're unsure where to go.

### Descending the Mountain

Head downhill along the canyon path. Watch for a **shining object** on the ground — this restores some of Rean's equipment. Open your Orbment menu when prompted and equip your **Master Quartz**.

**Treasure Chests in Eisengard Range:**
- **Tear** — early in the path, right side
- **Teara Balm** — branching left path
- **Proxy Puppet** — hidden alcove past the second monster group
- **Celestial Balm** — final chest before the boss area

> Collect ALL chests on side branches before proceeding. You cannot return to the upper areas later.

### First Battles

Your first monster encounter acts as a combat tutorial:
- **Field Attack:** Hit enemies on the field before combat starts for an Advantage (extra turns, reduced enemy HP)
- **Link System:** Connect party members for Follow-Up attacks after Unbalancing enemies
- After each fight, the **Monster Notebook** fills with data. Analyze every new enemy with the Battle Scope for 100% completion

> 🏆 **Achievement: Face of the Enemy** — Fill the Monster Notebook to 100%. Start scanning from the very first fight.

### Boss: Magic Knight Ortheim

<!-- checkpoint: ortheim-defeated | Defeat Magic Knight Ortheim -->

**Magic Knight Ortheim** blocks your path at the bottom of the range.

- **HP:** 33,768
- **Weakness:** All elements equally effective; all unbalance types ★★★☆
- **Strategy:** This is a scripted encounter — use Rean's **Flame Strike** for damage (chance to inflict Burn). Heal with Tear or Teara Balm when HP drops below 3000. The battle ends automatically once you bring its HP under 15,000.
- Don't waste rare items — the fight ends at the HP threshold regardless.

After the battle, story scenes play and you're transported to Ymir.

## November 30 — Ymir

<!-- checkpoint: ymir-arrival | Arrive in Ymir -->

### Exploring Ymir Village

You wake in the **Schwarzer Mansion** in Ymir, Rean's hometown. This is a free exploration day — talk to everyone and gather items before heading to the canyon.

**Required NPC Visits** (red "!" markers on map):
- **Lucia and Teo Schwarzer** — Baron Schwarzer's mansion (Rean's parents)
- **Elise and Celine** — at the footbath area
- **Princess Alfin** — Ymir Chapel
- **Toval Randonneur** — Valley's Echo Tavern
- **Head Chef Werner** — Phoenix Wings restaurant
- **Annabelle** — Ymir Valley path
- **Manager Baggins** — Phoenix Wings

**Bonus Items:**
- Speak with **Gerald** for **Fluffy Pancake ×2**
- If you imported Clear Data from Cold Steel I, receive **Groundbait** (amount depends on fishing rank)

**Books (Missable!):**
- **Imperial Chronicle - Issue 1** — Buy from **Plover Goods & Souvenirs** in Ymir
- **Gambler Jack Reprint #1** — Buy from **Plover Goods & Souvenirs** in Ymir
- **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 1** — Talk to **Ploval** directly at the General Store counter (do NOT just browse the shop menu — you must speak to her in person to receive this book)

> 🏆 **Achievement: Lending Library** — Gambler Jack II Ch.1 is missable. Grab it now or lose it forever. Also buy Imperial Chronicle Issue 1 and Gambler Jack Reprint #1 from Plover Goods before leaving Ymir.

**Recipes to obtain:**
- **Salty Onigiri (Recipe)** — given during story progression

**Shop Items:**
- **Coarse Rock Salt ×3** — available for purchase
- **Assorted Grains ×3** — available for purchase

> **Save your game before the bath event.** After visiting all required NPCs, enter the bath for a story scene that advances the day.

### Ymir Canyon Path

<!-- checkpoint: ymir-canyon-cleared | Clear Ymir Canyon -->

After the village events, you head out to **Ymir Canyon Path** with a **fixed party of Rean, Elise, and Toval**. The path is mostly linear — defeat monsters and collect treasure chests along the way.

**Treasure Chests in Ymir Canyon:**
- **Lighter**
- **Zeram Powder**
- **U-Material ×3**
- **Tearal Balm**
- **Poison Quartz**
- **All Sepith ×50**

### Boss: Magic Knight Ortheim

At the end of the canyon you face **Magic Knight Ortheim** (HP: 45,225).

- **Skills:** Sword Slash (frontal AoE), Ground Stab (area around boss), Boost (STR +50% and heals 15,000 HP)
- **Strategy:** Use Elise as main healer (Holy Squall restores 60% HP in radius). Rean and Toval focus physical Crafts. Use S-Crafts on critical bonus turns. Watch for Boost — it extends the fight.
- After reducing its HP, a cutscene triggers leading directly into the **Valimar Divine Knight mech battle**.

### Valimar Tutorial — Magic Knight Ortheim Phase 2

<!-- checkpoint: valimar-tutorial | Valimar Tutorial Mech Battle -->

This is your **first Divine Knight mech battle**. After the Magic Knight fight, Rean boards Valimar to face **Magic Knight Ortheim Phase 2** (HP: 84,400).

- **Mechanics:** Mech combat is rock-paper-scissors — select a body part (Head, Body, Arms) to attack. Hitting the correct weak point lands a critical hit, triggering a Link Attack for bonus damage.
- **Weak Points:** Idle Stance → attack **Head** (★★★★). Attack Stance → attack **Arms** (★★★★).
- **Strategy:** Attack the Head during idle stance and the Arms during attack stance. Link Attacks are the optimal way to deal damage.
- **Reward:** Large EXP bonus + story progression

> This tutorial teaches the Divine Knight battle system used throughout the rest of the game. Pay attention to the stance-based targeting.

> After defeating Magic Knight Ortheim, story events conclude the Prologue and open up Act 1.

<!-- checkpoint: prologue-complete | Prologue Complete -->

steps.text: Select your difficulty (Easy/Normal/Hard/Nightmare) and import Cold Steel I clear data if available.
steps.note: Transfer bonuses include items and Sepith based on your old save's level and rank.

steps.text:
🏆 **Cumulative Combat Achievements** — Several achievements track actions across the entire game. Keep these in mind from the start:
- **Tactician** — Win a battle with S rank (act quickly, take no damage, use link attacks)
- **Taking the Initiative** — Get 300 field advantages (always strike enemies from behind)
- **Mind if I Cut In?** — Use 100 S-Breaks (press L1+R1 during enemy turns when CP is 100+)
- **The Manway Method** — Win 600 battles (grind in the Epilogue corridor if needed)
- **One Good Burn Deserves Another** — 500 follow-up link attacks
- **Double the Trouble** — 100 Rush attacks
- **Smells Like Team Spirit** — 50 Burst attacks
- **Overdriven to Win** — 100 Overdrive uses
- **Shutdown Phenomenon** — Cancel enemy arts/crafts 100 times
- **Pieces of Eight** — Defeat 8 enemies simultaneously (use wide AoE crafts on large groups)
steps.note: These are cumulative across the whole playthrough. Start building progress from the very first fight to avoid needing to grind later.

steps.text: 🏆 **Achievement: The Reel Deal** — Catch all 24 fish species. Many fishing spots are chapter-specific and become permanently inaccessible. Fish at EVERY fishing spot you encounter throughout the game.
steps.note: Key missable fish: Ymir (Prologue only), Nord Highlands, Legram Lake. Always carry varied bait.

steps.text: 🏆 **Achievement: Intelligence Agent** — Complete all character profiles. Requires talking to specific NPCs at precise story moments. Many are one-time windows. Talk to EVERY NPC with a unique dialogue icon throughout the game.
steps.note: Character profiles update at story progression points. Check your notebook regularly for gaps. Some profiles require revisiting NPCs after story beats.

steps.text: 🏆 **Achievement: The Return of Rean QUARTZ-er** — Collect all 31 master quartz varieties. Some are found in one-time-only areas (Eisengard Range, Lohengrin Castle, Infernal Castle). Always check chests and monster drops thoroughly.
steps.note: Master quartz in one-time dungeons cannot be recovered. Prioritize full exploration of every dungeon before advancing.

steps.text: Equip your **Master Quartz** in the Orbment menu when prompted.
Pick up **Tear** from the first chest (right side of the path).
Pick up **Teara Balm** from the chest on the branching left path.
Pick up **Proxy Puppet** from the hidden alcove past the second monster group.
Pick up **Celestial Balm** from the final chest before the boss area.
Collect ALL chests before proceeding to the boss — you cannot return to upper Eisengard areas.
steps.note: The path is one-way downhill.

steps.text: Use **Battle Scope** on every new enemy type for Monster Notebook progress.
steps.note: Required for the Face of the Enemy achievement — start from the very first fight.

steps.text: **BOSS: Magic Knight Ortheim** (33,768 HP) — Use **Flame Strike** for damage (chance to inflict Burn). Heal with Tear or Teara Balm when HP drops below 3000. Battle ends automatically once you bring it under 15,000 HP.
steps.note: This is a scripted encounter — the fight ends via cutscene at the HP threshold. Don't waste rare items.

steps.text: Visit **Lucia and Teo Schwarzer** in Baron Schwarzer's mansion.
Find **Elise and Celine** at the footbath area.
Speak with **Princess Alfin** in Ymir Chapel.
Talk to **Toval** in Valley's Echo Tavern.
Visit **Head Chef Werner** in Phoenix Wings.
Find **Annabelle** on the Ymir Valley path.
Speak with **Manager Baggins** in Phoenix Wings.
Talk to **Gerald** for **Fluffy Pancake ×2** (bonus item).
Talk to **Ploval** directly at the General Store counter for **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 1** (book).
steps.note: Missable! You must speak to her in person, NOT through the shop menu. Required for Lending Library achievement.

steps.text: Buy **Imperial Chronicle - Issue 1** from **Plover Goods & Souvenirs** in Ymir.
steps.note: Required for Lending Library achievement.

steps.text: Buy **Gambler Jack Reprint #1** from **Plover Goods & Souvenirs** in Ymir.
steps.note: Required for Lending Library achievement.

steps.text: Obtain the **Salty Onigiri Recipe** during story progression.
**Save before entering the bath.** The bath event advances the story and you cannot return to free exploration.
Collect all treasure chests in **Ymir Canyon Path**: Lighter, Zeram Powder, U-Material ×3, Tearal Balm, Poison Quartz, All Sepith ×50.

**BOSS: Magic Knight Ortheim** (45,225 HP, Ymir Canyon) — Use Elise as healer (Holy Squall restores 60% HP in radius). Rean and Toval focus physical attacks and Crafts. Use S-Crafts on critical bonus turns. Watch for its Boost skill which grants STR +50% and heals 15,000 HP.
steps.note: Boss has area sword slash and ground stab attacks. After reducing its HP, a cutscene leads directly into the Valimar mech battle.

steps.text: **MECH BATTLE: Valimar vs Magic Knight Ortheim Phase 2** (84,400 HP) — First Divine Knight battle. Target **Head** during idle stance (★★★★ weakness) and **Arms** during attack stance (★★★★ weakness). Landing the correct part triggers Link Attacks for bonus damage.

sections.title: Act 1, Part 1: Celdic
sections.content:
# Act 1, Part 1 — Celdic

Act 1 begins the search for Class VII members scattered across Erebonia. Part 1 starts in **Ymir** on December 1st, takes you through **Lunaria Nature Park**, the highways around **Celdic**, and on to **Twin Dragons Bridge**, **Garrelia Byroad**, the **Terra Shrine**, and **Garrelia Fortress** before returning to Ymir on December 4th.

<!-- checkpoint: december-1-ymir | December 1st — Ymir -->

## December 1st — Ymir

As soon as you gain control of Rean, **Quick Travel** is available in the navigation menu.

### Town Preparation

Before leaving Ymir, visit the following NPCs:

- **Raio** (General Store, right side) — introduces weapon synthesis and orbment slot upgrades
- **Camillia** (General Store) — unlocks item trading (similar to pawn shop from CS1). On NG+, trade Zemurian Ore Shards for 50 U-Materials
- **Luke** (near the wrecked station) — gives you free **Tear Balm** items

> Do NOT leave Ymir through Ymir Canyon without speaking to Luke — free Tear Balms are easy to miss.

<!-- checkpoint: lunaria-nature-park | Enter Lunaria Nature Park -->

## Lunaria Nature Park

After the event scene you are warped into Lunaria Nature Park. This area contains **high elements** — Time, Space, and Mirage elements have enhanced effects on monsters here. Bonus effects on turn order may also appear (can be an advantage or disadvantage).

### Treasure Chest Locations

**Nature Park Area 3 (start here, head south):**
- **Stone Brooch** — southeast corner chest
- **Sepith Mass ×100** — southwest corner chest

**Nature Park Area 2 (west → east):**
- **Teara Balm** — west end chest
- **Citrus Bottle** — east end chest (keep this — it grants Faint resistance, useful later)
- Fishing spot near the western chest
- **Scepter Master Quartz** — monster chest at the very southwest corner
- **EP Charge II** — east area chest

**Nature Park Area 1 (south to exit):**
- **HP 1** — northeast corner chest
- **All Sepith ×100** — southwest corner chest
- **Orbment Charging Station** — near the park exit. Use it before the boss!

### Monster Guide (Nature Park)
| Monster | Drop 1 | Drop 2 |
|---------|--------|--------|
| Blade Horn | Chitinous Shell | Hearty Powder |
| Polyjelly | Clear Gelatin | Globby Fan |
| Purple Ooze | Clear Gelatin | Globby Fan |
| Gordi Chief | Red Beast Flesh | U-Material |
| Sasa Panda | Red Beast Flesh | U-Material |

> Scan ALL monsters with Battle Scope for the Monster Notebook.

<!-- checkpoint: boss-grunoja | Boss: Grunoja -->

## Boss: Grunoja

At the park exit you face the dungeon boss. The game introduces the **Overdrive** function during this fight.

| Stat | Value |
|------|-------|
| **HP** | 21,800 |
| **Item Drop** | Attack 2 |
| **Elemental Efficacy** | Earth 120, Water 100, **Fire 140**, Wind 100, Time 100, Space 100, Mirage 100 |
| **Unbalance** | Slash ★★☆☆, Thrust ★★☆☆, Pierce ★★☆☆, Strike ★★☆☆ |

**Overdrive Tutorial:** Highlight the attack icon, hold Right until the icon changes, then press confirm. Overdrive restores HP/EP/CP, grants three extra turns, and instant magic cast between linked characters.

**Strategy:**
- Buff your characters first, then attack the boss
- Use **Toval's wind magic** — he casts quickly
- Use **Rean's Autumn Leaf Cutter or Arc Slash** to delay the boss
- Boss can buff itself, paralyze with Seal, or hit a single target hard
- Save S-Craft for when the boss's HP is low

> **Save before the boss fight.** The Orbment Charging Station is your last rest point.

<!-- checkpoint: west-celdic-highway | West Celdic Highway -->

## West Celdic Highway & East Trista Highway

After defeating Grunoja, leave the park. Visit the **farmhouse** on the east side of the map for a small event. Head south — two treasure chests are near the southwest corner. Take the south exit for a scene, then head west. Pick up the treasure near the small tower and take the southwest exit to **East Trista Highway**.

East Trista Highway is a short area with three treasure chests and a fishing location to the west. Near the bridge, an event plays — Rean notices guards stationed there. Return to West Celdic Highway and take the southeast exit to **Celdic**.

### Treasure List (Highways)
| Treasure | Location |
|----------|----------|
| Celestial Balm | West Celdic Highway 2 |
| White Glasses | West Celdic Highway 2 |
| Shield 2 | West Celdic Highway 1 |
| EP Charge I | East Trista Highway 1 |
| Earth Lance | East Trista Highway 1 |
| Curia Balm | East Trista Highway 1 |

### Monster Guide (Highways)
| Monster | Drop 1 | Drop 2 | Note |
|---------|--------|--------|------|
| Crop Muncher | Assorted Grains | Red Beast Flesh | East Celdic Highway only |
| Deathcargot | Clear Gelatin | Chitinous Shell | |
| Fanged Wolf | Red Beast Flesh | Globby Fan | |
| Ripper Squirrel | Tear Balm | Red Beast Flesh | |
| Evil Crow | Fresh Egg | Red Beast Flesh | |
| King Dragonfly | Hearty Powder | Curia Balm | |
| Acerbic Tomartian | Acerbic Tomato | U-Material | |
| Zwordar | Hearty Powder | U-Material | East Celdic Highway only |

<!-- checkpoint: arrive-celdic | Arrive in Celdic -->

## Celdic

When you enter Celdic, three key event locations are marked with red exclamation marks:

- **Becky** — Celdic House (near the West Celdic Highway entrance)
- **Margot** — Weathercock Inn (behind the counter)
- **Rosine** — Grand Market

After visiting all three, an event scene unfolds in which Rean purchases the **Imperial Chronicle Issue #2**.

### Books & Recipes (Missable!)
| Item | Location | Note |
|------|----------|------|
| **Imperial Chronicle Issue #2** | Purchased during story event | Missable |
| **Gambler Jack Reprint #2** | Buy from **Cornette's General Goods** (Grand Market, center) | Missable |
| **Black Records #2** | Buy from **Cornette's General Goods** (Grand Market, center) | NG+ only |
| **Fresh Vegetable Juice** (Recipe) | Speak to old lady **Moulbaix** at the Celdic Chapel (west end) | |

> 🏆 **Achievement: Lending Library** — Don't miss these books. Black Records #2 is only available on NG+.

After finishing in town, exit toward **East Celdic Highway**.

<!-- checkpoint: east-celdic-highway | East Celdic Highway -->

## East Celdic Highway

### Treasure List
| Treasure | Location |
|----------|----------|
| Silver Earring | East Celdic Highway 1 (north) |
| Tearal Balm | East Celdic Highway 1 |
| U-Material ×3 | East Celdic Highway 2 |
| Mute | East Celdic Highway 2 |

### Key Events

1. **Gambler Jack II — Chapter 1:** Talk to **Tarim**, the NPC near the farmhouse in the northeast corner. These books have a very limited collection window — all 14 volumes are needed to exchange for the strongest weapon later. If you miss a volume, the pawn shop Inspect Curios function can sometimes offer them, but this is luck-based.

2. **Old Key:** Open the treasure chest just past the bridge in the southeast. This triggers an event where Rean discovers an Old Key.

3. **Machias Joins:** Go to the windmill in the center-south of the map. After the event scene, **Machias** joins your party.

Return to Celdic.

### Back in Celdic

- Visit **Market Manager Otto** at the Market Manager's House (southwest). He introduces the quest system, AP (Academic Points), and the Notebook quest section. Earning max AP in each chapter results in an S Rank.
- Visit the **Chapel** and speak to **Rosine** — she provides **3 Tear Balms** and adds Page 1 to her Character Profile.

> **Note:** Mira from quests are received at the end of each Act.

### New Character Profiles
| Date | Character | Requirements |
|------|-----------|-------------|
| December 1 | Rean [Page 1] | Automatic |
| December 1 | Toval [Page 1] | Key event (Automatic) |
| December 1 | Rosine [Page 1] | Speak to Rosine after Machias joins |
| December 1 | Elliot [Page 1] | Automatic |

<!-- checkpoint: side-quests | Side Quests -->

## Side Quests

### Munch No More (Side Quest)

Head to **East Celdic Highway 2** and find the quest monster at the **northeast corner** of the map.

| Boss | HP | Elemental Efficacy | Unbalance |
|------|----|--------------------|-----------|
| **Giant Crop Muncher** | 40,250 | Earth 110, Water 90, **Fire 120**, Wind 100 | All ★★★☆ |
| Crop Muncher ×7 | 3,680 each | Earth 100, Water 80, **Fire 180**, Wind 120 | All ★★★☆ |

After defeating the monster, choose to return to Celdic and report to **Market Manager Otto**.

- **Client:** Market Manager Otto
- **Reward:** Detection Quartz, 1,500 Mira, 4 AP

> Equip the **Detection Quartz** — it displays all treasure chests on the mini-map.

### Herbal Remedies (Story Quest)

1. Go to the **Celdic Chapel** and speak to **Father Zirbel** behind the altar
2. Go to the **Grand Market** and speak to **Flint** by the stall on the northwest side
3. Leave town via **West Celdic Highway** and head north toward the Lunaria Nature Park entrance
4. Speak to **Johnson**, the NPC near the gate
5. Enter Lunaria Nature Park and find the **Cure Herb** at the **northeast corner** of the map near a treasure chest
6. Choose to return to Celdic and give the Cure Herb to Father Zirbel

- **Client:** Father Zirbel
- **Reward:** Teara Balm ×2, Celestial Balm ×2, 4 AP

### After Quests

Exit Celdic via East Celdic Highway. Go to the **windmill** on the south area of the map. Examine the communication device and select the **second choice** to advance the story. After the event scene, rendezvous at **Point D** on East Celdic Highway 3 (take the east exit of East Celdic Highway 2).

<!-- checkpoint: east-celdic-highway-3 | East Celdic Highway 3 -->

## East Celdic Highway 3

Pick up the **Sepith Mass ×100** from the treasure chest at the northeast corner. Head to **Point D** at the northeast end — **Elliot and Fie** join your party.

The game explains that the **Overdrive** function only works between Rean and his friends by default. For other Class VII members, you must clear **Trial Chests** (blue treasure chests with prearranged party fights) to unlock Overdrive between them. The **Burst** function during Link Attacks and the ability to **switch party members in battle** are also introduced.

### Treasure List
| Treasure | Location |
|----------|----------|
| Sepith Mass ×100 | East Celdic Highway 3 (NE) |
| Celestial Balm | East Celdic Highway 3 |
| Feather Boots | East Celdic Highway 3 |
| Coral Ring | East Celdic Highway 3 |
| Gladiator Headband | Twin Dragons Bridge — Celdic Side (monster chest, SW) |

### Trial Chest: Senior Bear Mole (Southwest)

| Boss | HP | Elemental Efficacy | Drop | Unbalance |
|------|----|--------------------|------|-----------|
| **Senior Bear Mole** | 20,250 | Earth 110, Water 60, **Fire 180**, Wind 110 | Crest R | All ★☆☆☆ |
| Bear Mole ×4 | 5,145 each | Earth 110, Water 60, **Fire 180**, Wind 110 | Red Beast Flesh, U-Material | All ★☆☆☆ |

**Skills:** Hammer Swing (single, knockback + Faint), Jump Slam (single, Faint).

> ⚠️ **Equip a Faint Resistant accessory** (the Citrus Bottle from Lunaria Nature Park works). Enter with full CP. Wait until moles group up, then use S-Craft to clear them. Alternatively, have Machias use Petrify Shell on grouped enemies. Use Elliot for area attack arts and healing.

### Monster Guide (ECH 3)
| Monster | Drop 1 | Drop 2 |
|---------|--------|--------|
| Flying Feline | Red Beast Flesh | Globby Fat |
| Eerie Bug | Clear Gelatin | Hearty Powder |
| Axebird | Red Beast Flesh | U-Material |
| Bear Mole | Red Beast Flesh | U-Material |
| Scary Dinosaur | White Beast Flesh | Chitinous Shell |

Take the **southeast exit** to Twin Dragons Bridge.

<!-- checkpoint: twin-dragons-bridge | Twin Dragons Bridge -->

## Twin Dragons Bridge

Head to the **waiting lounge** (north side of map).

- **Recipe: Cheese Omelet** — speak to **Morize** in the northwest corner of the waiting lounge
- Exit the building and go near the bridge to trigger an event: **Merchant Albel** arguing with a soldier

### Hidden Quest: A Cry For Help

After witnessing the Merchant Albel argument, leave Twin Dragons Bridge and head north toward East Celdic Highway 2. An event scene triggers on the way.

Find the Merchant on **East Celdic Highway 3**, near where you found the Sepith Mass chest. Defeat the monsters, then choose to return to Twin Dragons Bridge.

- **Client:** Merchant Albel
- **Reward:** Red Pendulum, 2,000 Mira, 4 AP

### Continuing Through the Bridge

Return to the waiting lounge and speak to the **three merchants** (marked with red exclamation marks) on the right, left, and center. Go to the east side of the building for an event scene. When ready, **examine the duct** to advance the story. Move through the duct to the east exit, then take the east exit again to reach the **Garrelia Side** of Twin Dragons Bridge.

<!-- checkpoint: garrelia-byroad | Garrelia Byroad -->

## Garrelia Byroad

From the Garrelia Side, take the southeast exit to Garrelia Byroad. Take the north exit near the entrance — this loops back to the Garrelia Side where a **merchant under the bridge** sells the costume attachment **Contact Lens** (can buy instead of exchanging U-Material later).

### Treasure List (Garrelia Byroad)
| Treasure | Location |
|----------|----------|
| Celestial Balm | Garrelia Byroad 1 (NW at path split) |
| Defense 2 | Garrelia Byroad 1 (N at path split) |
| Flexible Coat | Garrelia Byroad 1 |
| Sepith ×100 | Garrelia Byroad 1 |
| Tearal Balm | Garrelia Byroad 1 |
| Holy Chain | Garrelia Byroad 2 (S at path split) |
| EP Charge I | Garrelia Byroad 2 |
| Reaper | Garrelia Byroad 2 (SE monster chest) |

### Trial Chest: Queen Bee (Garrelia Byroad 1)

Clearing this Trial Chest unlocks **Overdrive for Elliot and Fie**.

| Boss | HP | Elemental Efficacy | Drop | Unbalance |
|------|----|--------------------|------|-----------|
| **Queen Bee** | 22,419 | Earth 110, Water 60, **Fire 180**, Wind 110 | Luminous Ray R | Slash ★★☆☆, Thrust ☆, **Pierce ★★★★**, Strike ☆ |
| Thunder Bee ×2 | 4,836 each | Earth 110, Water 60, **Fire 180**, Wind 110 | Red Beast Flesh, U-Material | Same |

**Skills:** Sting (single, Poison).

**Strategy:** Have Fie use Sweep every turn until trash mobs die, then switch to Scud Reaper. Elliot uses Resounding Beat on Fie and Holy Song for healing; use Heatwave when no healing is needed.

### Monster Guide (Garrelia Byroad)
| Monster | Drop 1 | Drop 2 |
|---------|--------|--------|
| Turtle Bug | Chitinous Shell | U-Material |
| Dirty Rat | Red Beast Flesh | U-Material |
| Moon Mole | Red Beast Flesh | Globby Fat |
| Scavenger Crow | Fresh Egg | Red Beast Flesh |
| Cockatrice | Red Beast Flesh | Globby Fat |
| Thunder Bee | Chitinous Shell | Hearty Powder |

In Garrelia Byroad 2, go south at the path split to find an optional area leading to the **Terra Shrine**.

<!-- checkpoint: terra-shrine | Terra Shrine -->

## Terra Shrine

Head downstairs and open the gate to enter the main area.

### Treasure List
| Treasure | Location |
|----------|----------|
| Seal | Terra Spirit Cave |
| Tearal Balm | Terra Spirit Cave |
| Septium Vein | Terra Spirit Cave (monster chest, N side) |

### Trial Chest: Giant Amalgam (South Side)

Clearing this Trial Chest unlocks **Overdrive for Fie and Machias**.

| Boss | HP | Elemental Efficacy | Drop | Unbalance |
|------|----|--------------------|------|-----------|
| **Giant Amalgam** | 22,462 | Earth 100, Water 80, Fire 120, Wind 100, Time 100, Space 100, Mirage 100 | Frost Edge R | Slash ★☆☆☆, Thrust ★★★☆, Pierce ★★☆☆, **Strike ★★★★** |
| Dastardly Amalgam | 5,145 each | Same | Coarse Rock Salt, Chitinous Shell | Same |

**Skills:** Roll (single, Petrify).

**Strategy:** Fie uses Sweep until mobs die, then Scud Reaper. Machias uses Energy Shell when Fie is under 2/3 HP, otherwise Heatwave.

### Navigation

Go west, then south to find the Seal Quartz. Continue northwest to a dead end, then go southeast to find a **switch** — press it to raise stairs to the south area. Go west, pick up the Tearal Balm near the Giant Beetle. Head north for a monster chest with **Septium Vein**. Go south past the Giant Beetle to find another **switch** that raises stairs to the boss area on the west end.

### Boss: Tildawn Gaia ×3

Defeating this boss grants **3 AP**.

| Boss | HP | Elemental Efficacy | Drop | Unbalance |
|------|----|--------------------|------|-----------|
| **Tildawn Gaia ×3** | 32,670 each | **Earth 0**, Water 100, Fire 100, Wind 120, Time 130, Space 130, Mirage 130 | Curia Balm, U-Material | Slash ★☆☆☆, Thrust ★☆☆☆, Pierce ★☆☆☆, Strike ★★☆☆ |

**Skills:** Eye Laser (line), Black Energy (all, Poison), Green Energy (all, Petrify), Needle Shot (single, Earth art).

**Strategy:**
- **Elliot** as main healer
- **Fie** as dodge tank — her Bullet Cyclone provides AT delay
- **Toval** can Seal enemies with Double Strike
- **Machias** as backup healer with Energy Shell
- Each boss has deadly area attacks that can poison the party

Take the elevator to leave.

<!-- checkpoint: garrelia-fortress | Garrelia Fortress -->

## Garrelia Fortress

Return to Garrelia Byroad 2. Go northeast — pick up the **EP Charge I** along the way and the **Reaper** quartz from the southeast monster chest. Continue to the northeast end to reach **Garrelia Fortress**. Use the Orbment Station and save before entering.

### Boss: Xeno & Leonidas (Unwinnable)

| Boss | HP | Elemental Efficacy | Unbalance |
|------|----|--------------------|-----------|
| **Xeno** | 87,175 | All elements 90 | Thrust ★☆☆☆, Strike ★☆☆☆ |
| **Leonidas** | 89,375 | All elements 90 | Slash ★☆☆☆, Pierce ★☆☆☆ |

This battle is **unwinnable**. For **bonus AP (3 AP)**, reduce one boss's HP to **30% or below within 40 turns**.

**Strategy:**
- Enter with full CP on all party members
- Have Rean buff the entire party, then use everyone's S-Crafts and Overdrive
- Use AT Delay skills: Rean's **Arc Slash**, Fie's **Bullet Cyclone**
- **Elliot** as main healer
- At 50% HP, they use their S-Craft dealing ~70% of your party's health — be ready to heal
- Xeno can lay mines — **scan a mine** for the Battle Trophy

### Mech Battle: Drakkhen (Sword) ×2

| Boss | HP | Elemental Efficacy | Stance Weaknesses |
|------|----|--------------------|-------------------|
| **Drakkhen (Sword)** | 95,000 | Earth 100, Water 120, Fire 120, Wind 100 | Idle: **Body ★★★★**; Attack: **Head ★★★★** |

Focus on defeating one Drakkhen unit. Attack the **Body during Idle Stance**, attack the **Head during Attack Stance**. When one unit is defeated, a scene ends the battle.

### Mech Battle: Drakkhen (Sword + Gun)

| Boss | HP | Stance Weaknesses |
|------|----|--------------------|
| **Drakkhen (Sword)** | 95,000 | Idle: Body ★★★★; Attack: Head ★★★★ |
| **Drakkhen (Gun)** | 104,800 | Idle: **Head ★★★☆**; Attack: **Body ★★★★** |

The **backup pilot** system is introduced — your partner gets an additional turn with three abilities: **EX Arts** (partner-based skills), **Shinki** (restore HP using EP), **Charge** (restore EP). Switch partners with R button. Victory grants **100 Link EXP** with your partner.

### After the Battle

Head to the **Resting Area** (building on the north side).

- **Gambler Jack II — Chapter 2:** Speak to **Arbekker** to receive the book
- Speak to **Monica** (General Store) and **Munk** (dining tables, southeast) to add their profiles to your notebook

When ready, examine Valimar and pick the first choice to advance.

<!-- checkpoint: december-4-ymir | December 4 — Ymir -->

## December 4 — Ymir

### Recipes & Books (Missable!)
| Item | Location |
|------|----------|
| **Tomato Jelly** (Recipe) | Purchase the recipe book from the **General Store** |

### Bonding Events

The game introduces bonding events (yellow "!" markers). You receive a **limited number of Bonding Points** — it is impossible to see all events on a single playthrough. Additional points are available on NG+.

Doing **Machias** and **Claire's** bonding events adds Page 1 to their profiles.

| Character | Location | Notes |
|-----------|----------|-------|
| **Claire** | Near Station | Profile Page 1 + Link EXP +500 |
| **Elliot** | Inn & Pub | Link EXP +500 |
| **Fie** | Baron's Mansion | Link EXP +500 |
| **Machias** | Near Phoenix Wings | Profile Page 1 + Link EXP +500 |
| **Toval** | Footbath | Link EXP +500 |

### Other Activities

- **Snowboard Mini Game** — leave town via southeast exit. Prizes depend on your performance per course.
- Purchase the **Tomato Jelly** recipe from the General Store before leaving.

### Hidden Quest: Leaf it to Me

Talk to **Alf or Kiki** (the two kids near the station). Choose the **first dialogue option** to offer your assistance.

**Objective:** Go to **Ymir Valley** and find two different types of colored leaves:
1. **Leaf 1:** Northwest corner of Ymir Valley 1
2. **Leaf 2:** Upper southeast corner of Ymir Valley 2 (near a treasure chest)

Return both leaves to Alf and Kiki.

> There is a **monkey-like monster** in Ymir Valley — scan it for the Battle Trophy.

- **Client:** Alf & Kiki
- **Reward:** Mishy Plushie, 1,500 Mira, 4 AP

<!-- checkpoint: end-part-1 | End of Part 1 -->

## End of Part 1

After finishing all side activities, go to your room at the **Baron's Mansion** and pick the first choice to end Part 1.

### AP Summary (S-Rank: 35 AP)
| Objective | AP |
|-----------|-----|
| Regroup with Friends — Celdic | 5 |
| Meet up with 4th Panzer Division | 8 |
| Put up a fight against Xeno and Leonidas | 3 |
| Explore the Terra Shrine | 3 |
| Quest: Munch No More | 4 |
| Quest: Herbal Remedies | 4 |
| Quest: A Cry For Help [Hidden] | 4 |
| Quest: Leaf it to Me [Hidden] | 4 |
| **Total** | **35** |

> Earning 35 AP results in an **S-Rank** for this chapter.

steps.text: Visit **Raio** at the General Store in Ymir for weapon synthesis and orbment slot upgrades.
Speak to **Camillia** at the General Store for item trading. On NG+, trade Zemurian Ore Shards for 50 U-Materials.
Talk to **Luke** near the wrecked station in Ymir for free **Tear Balm** items.
Pick up **Stone Brooch** from the southeast corner chest in Nature Park Area 3.
Grab **Sepith Mass ×100** from the southwest chest in Nature Park Area 3.
Collect **Teara Balm** from the west end chest in Nature Park Area 2.
Grab **Citrus Bottle** from the east end chest in Nature Park Area 2. Keep this equipped — it grants Faint resistance for an upcoming Trial Chest.
Defeat the monster chest enemies for the **Scepter Master Quartz** at the southwest corner of the bridge area.
Collect **EP Charge II** from the east side of the bridge area.
Pick up **HP 1** quartz from the northeast corner chest in Nature Park Area 1.
Grab **All Sepith ×100** from the southwest corner chest in Nature Park Area 1.
Use the **Orbment Charging Station** near the Nature Park exit before the boss fight.
**Save your game** before entering the boss arena. The charging station is your last rest point.

**BOSS: Grunoja** (HP: 21,800) — Fire weakness (140). The Overdrive function is introduced here. Use Toval's wind magic for speed, Rean's Autumn Leaf Cutter/Arc Slash to delay. Save S-Craft for low HP.
steps.note: Item Drop: Attack 2. Boss can buff itself, inflict Seal (paralyze), or hit a single target hard.

steps.text: After defeating Grunoja, visit the **farmhouse** on the east side of the map for a small event.
Pick up **Celestial Balm** and **White Glasses** from chests in West Celdic Highway 2.
Grab **Shield 2** from West Celdic Highway 1.
Detour to **East Trista Highway** — collect **EP Charge I**, **Earth Lance**, and **Curia Balm**. Note the fishing spot to the west. Guards block the bridge to Trista.
In Celdic, visit the three key event locations (red "!" marks): **Becky** (house near W entrance), **Margot** (Weathercock Inn), **Rosine** (Grand Market).
**Imperial Chronicle Issue #2** is obtained during the Celdic story event scene.
steps.note: Missable book. Required for Lending Library achievement.

steps.text: Buy **Gambler Jack Reprint #2** from **Cornette's General Goods** at the Grand Market (center stall).
steps.note: Missable. Required for Lending Library achievement.

steps.text: Buy **Black Records #2** from **Cornette's General Goods** at the Grand Market (center stall).
steps.note: NG+ only.

steps.text: Learn the **Fresh Vegetable Juice** recipe from old lady **Moulbaix** at the Celdic Chapel (west end).
steps.note: Required for recipe completion.

steps.text: Pick up **Silver Earring** from the northern part of East Celdic Highway 1.
Talk to **Tarim** near the farmhouse in the northeast corner of East Celdic Highway for **Gambler Jack II — Chapter 1**.
steps.note: Missable! Collect all 14 volumes of Gambler Jack II to exchange for the strongest weapon later.

steps.text: Open the treasure chest past the bridge (southeast) to trigger the **Old Key** event.
steps.note: Opens the windmill for story progression.

steps.text: Visit the **windmill** (center-south) for an event scene. **Machias** joins your party.
Return to Celdic. Visit **Market Manager Otto** (Market Manager's House, southwest) to unlock the quest system and AP tracking.
Speak to **Rosine** at the Chapel for **3 Tear Balms** and her Character Profile Page 1.
Complete **Munch No More**: defeat the Giant Crop Muncher (HP: 40,250) + 7 Crop Munchers on East Celdic Highway 2 (northeast corner). Report to Market Manager Otto.
steps.note: Reward: Detection Quartz + 1,500 Mira + 4 AP. Equip Detection Quartz to show treasure chests on the mini-map.

steps.text: Complete **Herbal Remedies**: speak to Father Zirbel (Chapel) → Flint (Grand Market NW stall) → Johnson (near Lunaria Park gate on W Celdic Highway) → find the Cure Herb (NE corner of Lunaria Nature Park) → return to Father Zirbel.
steps.note: Reward: Teara Balm ×2 + Celestial Balm ×2 + 4 AP.

steps.text: Exit Celdic via East Celdic Highway. At the windmill, examine the communication device and select the **second choice**. Head to **Point D** on East Celdic Highway 3 (east exit of Highway 2).
Pick up **Sepith Mass ×100** at the northeast corner of East Celdic Highway 3.
Head to Point D (northeast end). **Elliot** and **Fie** join your party. Overdrive, Burst, and party switching in battle are introduced.
Grab **Gladiator Headband** from the monster chest in the southwest area.

**Trial Chest: Senior Bear Mole** (HP: 20,250) + Bear Mole ×4 (HP: 5,145) — prearranged party fight at the southwest blue chest. Equip **Citrus Bottle** for Faint resistance. Enter with full CP and S-Craft grouped enemies.
steps.note: Boss can inflict Faint. Use Machias' Petrify Shell on grouped moles. Elliot for area arts and healing.

steps.text: Learn the **Cheese Omelet** recipe from **Morize** in the northwest corner of the Twin Dragons Bridge waiting lounge.

**Hidden Quest: A Cry For Help** — After witnessing Merchant Albel arguing with a soldier near the bridge, leave Twin Dragons Bridge and head north toward East Celdic Highway 2. Find the merchant on ECH 3 near the Sepith Mass chest, defeat the monsters, and return.
steps.note: Missable! Client: Merchant Albel. Reward: Red Pendulum + 2,000 Mira + 4 AP.

steps.text: Speak to the three merchants in the waiting lounge (red marks), trigger the east-side event, then **examine the duct** to progress. Navigate through to the Garrelia Side.
From Garrelia Side, take the SE exit to Garrelia Byroad, then quickly loop back north to find a **merchant under the bridge** selling the **Contact Lens** costume attachment.
**Trial Chest: Queen Bee** (HP: 22,419) + Thunder Bee ×2 (HP: 4,836) — unlocks **Overdrive for Elliot and Fie**. Fie uses Sweep then Scud Reaper; Elliot uses Resounding Beat and Holy Song.
steps.note: Queen Bee's Sting can inflict Poison. Weak to Pierce (★★★★).

steps.text: **Trial Chest: Giant Amalgam** (HP: 22,462) in Terra Shrine — unlocks **Overdrive for Fie and Machias**. Roll attack can inflict Petrify. Weak to Strike (★★★★).
steps.note: Fie: Sweep then Scud Reaper. Machias: Energy Shell when Fie is below 2/3 HP, otherwise Heatwave.

steps.text: **BOSS: Tildawn Gaia ×3** (HP: 32,670 each) — immune to Earth. Use Fie's Bullet Cyclone for AT delay, Elliot as main healer, Toval to Seal with Double Strike. Deadly AoE attacks can Poison or Petrify.
steps.note: Grants 3 AP. Drop: Curia Balm, U-Material.

steps.text: **BOSS: Xeno (HP: 87,175) & Leonidas (HP: 89,375)** — Unwinnable battle. For **3 bonus AP**, reduce one boss to 30% HP within 40 turns. Enter with full CP, buff, S-Craft everyone, then use AT delay skills.
steps.note: At 50% HP they use S-Craft dealing ~70% of party HP. Xeno can lay mines — scan one for Battle Trophy.

steps.text: **Mech Battle: Drakkhen (Sword) ×2** (HP: 95,000 each) — Idle Stance: attack Body; Attack Stance: attack Head. Defeat one unit to end the battle.
**Mech Battle: Drakkhen Sword + Gun** — Gun type (HP: 104,800) reverses weaknesses: Idle → Head, Attack → Body. Backup pilot system introduced (EX Arts, Shinki, Charge). Victory gives 100 Link EXP.
At the Resting Area, speak to **Arbekker** for **Gambler Jack II — Chapter 2**. Also speak to Monica and Munk for notebook profiles.
steps.note: Missable! NPC dialogue only.

steps.text: Purchase the **Tomato Jelly** recipe book from the **General Store** in Ymir.
steps.note: Required for recipe completion.

steps.text: Spend your **Bonding Points** in Ymir. Available: **Claire** (Station), **Elliot** (Inn), **Fie** (Baron's Mansion), **Machias** (Phoenix Wings), **Toval** (Footbath). Machias and Claire's events add Profile Page 1.
steps.note: Link EXP +500 per event. Limited points — impossible to see all on first playthrough.

steps.text: **Hidden Quest: Leaf it to Me** — Talk to **Alf or Kiki** (kids near the station in Ymir). Go to Ymir Valley and find two colored leaves: Leaf 1 at the NW corner of Valley 1, Leaf 2 at the upper SE corner of Valley 2 (near a treasure chest). Return to the kids.
steps.note: Missable! Client: Alf & Kiki. Reward: Mishy Plushie + 1,500 Mira + 4 AP. Scan the monkey-like monster in Ymir Valley for the Battle Trophy.

steps.text: Go to your room at the **Baron's Mansion** and choose the first option to end Part 1. S-Rank requires **35 AP**.

sections.title: Act 1, Part 2: Nord Highlands
sections.content:
# Act 1, Part 2 — Nord Highlands

Part 2 takes you to the vast **Nord Highlands** and **Zender Gate** to find more Class VII allies. You'll traverse the open plains on horseback, complete quests around Lake Lacrima, and infiltrate the Watchtower to disable an orbal jammer.

<!-- checkpoint: arrive-nord | Arrive at Nord Highlands -->

## Party Selection

At the start, you select two members from Class VII plus a guest character (**Sharon**, **Claire**, or **Toval**). Sharon is the primary guest for Nord. The party is **fixed for this entire segment** — choose wisely.

> Guest characters carry powerful equipped accessories. **Unequip their accessories before they leave** your party — you lose access to any gear still on them.

## Exploring the Highlands

Ride a horse to traverse the open Highlands. Key locations:

- **Zender Gate** — new weapons, recipes, and classmates (Beryl, Mint) are here
- **Lake Lacrima / Elder's Camp** — side quest NPCs, shops
- **Nord Settlement** — story events, NPC conversations

### Recipes & Books
| Item | Location |
|------|----------|
| **Potato Croquette (Recipe)** | Marx, Mess Hall at Zender Gate |
| **Hot Milk Tea (Recipe)** | Old Lady Jedah, Lake Lacrima / Elder's Camp |
| **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 3 (Book)** | San at the Doctor's Camp |
| **Gambler Jack Reprint #3 (Book)** | Kilte's Store (General Store) at Lake Lacrima |
| **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 4 (Book)** | Talk to Sergeant Ogram at Zender Gate |
| **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 5 (Book)** | Talk to Masha at Ymir House (available 12/8 on return to Ymir) |
| **Imperial Chronicle - Issue 3 (Book)** | Buy from Plover Goods & Souvenirs, Ymir (also Watteau's Store, Legram or Fortnum Books, Bareahard) |

> 🏆 **Achievement: Lending Library** — Collect ALL "Red Moon Rose" and book series entries. Don't miss Gambler Jack volumes here.

> 🏆 **Achievement: Wartime Rationer** — Requires all recipes. Buy both recipes in this section.

<!-- checkpoint: nord-explored | Nord Highlands Explored -->

## Side Quests

### Highlands Hunt (Side Quest)
- **Objective:** Defeat marked monsters in the Highlands
- **Turn in:** Elder Ivan at Lake Lacrima
- **Availability:** Available upon arrival. Expires when you begin the Watchtower assault.

### Foaling Around (Side Quest)
- **Objective:** Find a runaway horse. Speak to the girl near the sheep to start. Track the horse to various locations (including Nord Settlement) until found.
- **Availability:** Available during free exploration period only.

### Zats Amore (Hidden Quest)
- **How to find:** Speak to soldiers near the Zender Gate weapon shop
- **Objective:** Hunt down an item at a marked spot in the South Highlands and return it
- **Availability:** Only during free exploration. **Missable — check weapon shop soldiers.**

### Azuki's Adventure (Hidden Quest)
- **How to find:** Speak to the woman behind the counter at the Ymir goods store during your free day upon returning to Ymir
- **Availability:** Only available on the Ymir return visit. **Easily missable.**

> ⚠️ **All side quests in this section expire when you begin the Watchtower infiltration.** Complete them first.

<!-- checkpoint: nord-quests-done | Nord Side Quests Complete -->

## Bonding Events

During free time at the Nord Settlement, you receive **2 Bonding Points**. Spend them on available party members:

- Characters available vary based on your party selection
- Bonding scenes at Nord highlight personal backstories and Link Level growth

> Save before spending points to see multiple scenes, then reload for your preferred choices.

## Treasure Chests — Highlands

| Location | Contents |
|----------|----------|
| South Highlands (east path) | Teara Balm |
| South Highlands (northwest) | EP Charge II |
| South Highlands (south) | Gladiator Belt |
| East Highlands (pond area) | Sepith Mass |
| Lake Lacrima waterside | Celestial Balm |
| Aria Shrine 1F | Curia Balm ×2 |
| Aria Shrine 2F (monster chest) | Scepter Master Quartz |

> Open ALL chests before advancing to the Watchtower. You can revisit some areas in Act 2 but others become inaccessible.

## Aria Shrine (Optional Dungeon)

Found in **Nord Highlands – East**. This is an optional dungeon with stronger enemies but grants **bonus AP** at chapter end.

- **Enemies:** Higher level than surrounding Highlands
- **Reward:** AP bonus + treasure chests with advanced equipment
- **Recommended:** Complete this before the Watchtower for the AP bonus

## The Watchtower Infiltration

<!-- checkpoint: watchtower-infiltration | Begin Watchtower Assault -->

### Nomadic Settlement Ambush

Before reaching the Watchtower, you encounter a **Jaeger ambush at the Nomadic Settlement**. Defeat the Jaeger squad to proceed.

- **Enemies:** Jaeger soldiers (mixed melee and ranged)
- **Strategy:** Buff party and focus fire. This fight can catch you off guard — make sure you're healed up before approaching the settlement.

### Key Objectives
Infiltrate the Nord Highlands Watchtower to destroy the orbal wave jammer. The dungeon involves several floors of battles leading to the rooftop.

### Enemies
| Enemy | HP (Normal) | Drops |
|-------|------------|-------|
| Jaeger - Greatsword | ~11,229 | Curia Balm, Reviving Balm |
| Jaeger - Rifle | ~10,488 | Teara Balm, EP Charge II |

**Strategy for Jaegers:** Buff party early, focus damage on one enemy at a time. Use Toval/Claire's S-Craft to clear groups quickly. The Greatsword type hits for 2000–3500+ damage.

### Rooftop Boss: Altina & Bleublanc

<!-- checkpoint: watchtower-boss | Watchtower Boss Defeated -->

- **Altina:** High evasion, uses arts
- **Bleublanc:** High HP, physical attacks + vanishing
- **Bonus AP:** Defeat both within 40 turns
- **Strategy:** Focus Altina first (lower HP), keep party healed. Use AoE to hit both when they're close together. Save S-Crafts for when one is nearly defeated.

> **Save before the rooftop.** This is a two-phase boss sequence.

### Mech Battle: Valimar vs Drakkhen Forces

After the rooftop fight, a mech battle follows:
- **Enemies:** Spiegel, Drakkhen Gun, Drakkhen Sword, plus an untargetable Airship RF30
- **Strategy:** Focus the Drakkhen units first (they deal damage while Spiegel buffs). Use Valimar's strongest attack on Spiegel last.

<!-- checkpoint: act-1-part-2-complete | Act 1 Part 2 Complete -->

steps.text: Select your party: two Class VII members + guest (**Sharon**, **Claire**, or **Toval**). Sharon is the primary guest for Nord.
steps.note: Party is fixed for this segment. Unequip guest accessories before they leave your party.

steps.text: Visit **Zender Gate** for new weapons, recipes, and to meet classmates (Beryl, Mint).
Buy **Potato Croquette Recipe** from Marx at the Zender Gate Mess Hall.
steps.note: Required for Wartime Rationer achievement.

steps.text: Get **Hot Milk Tea Recipe** from Old Lady Jedah at Lake Lacrima / Elder's Camp.
Pick up **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 3** (book) from **San at the Doctor's Camp**.
steps.note: Required for Lending Library achievement.

steps.text: Pick up **Gambler Jack Reprint #3** (book) from **Kilte's Store (General Store) at Lake Lacrima**.
Talk to **Sergeant Ogram** at **Zender Gate** for **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 4**.
steps.note: Missable! Required for Lending Library achievement.

steps.text: Talk to **Masha** at **Ymir House** for **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 5** (available 12/8 on return to Ymir).
steps.note: Missable! Required for Lending Library achievement.

steps.text: Buy **Imperial Chronicle - Issue 3** from **Plover Goods & Souvenirs** in Ymir (also available at Watteau's Store in Legram or Fortnum Books in Bareahard).
steps.note: Required for Lending Library achievement.

steps.text: Complete **Highlands Hunt**: defeat marked monsters, turn in to Elder Ivan at Lake Lacrima.
steps.note: Expires when Watchtower assault begins.

steps.text: Complete **Foaling Around**: find the runaway horse by tracking it across locations including Nord Settlement.
**Hidden Quest: Zats Amore** — Speak to soldiers near the Zender Gate weapon shop, then retrieve an item from the South Highlands.
steps.note: Missable! Required for Honor Roll achievement.

steps.text: **Hidden Quest: Azuki's Adventure** — Speak to the woman behind the counter at Ymir goods store on your return visit.
steps.note: Easily missable! Only available during the brief Ymir return.

steps.text: Spend your **2 Bonding Points** during free time at Nord Settlement on available party members.
steps.note: Save before choosing. Affects Link Levels and final cutscene partner.

steps.text: ⚠️ ALL side quests expire when you begin the Watchtower infiltration. Complete everything first.
Complete the optional **Aria Shrine** dungeon in Nord Highlands – East for bonus AP.
steps.note: Higher-level enemies but grants extra Academic Points at chapter end.

steps.text: 🎣 **The Reel Deal reminder:** Fish at ALL spots in the Nord Highlands (Lake Lacrima, East Highlands pond). Nord fish species are unique and some cannot be caught elsewhere.
steps.note: Carry varied bait. Some Nord fishing spots become inaccessible after the Watchtower assault.

steps.text: 📓 **Intelligence Agent reminder:** Talk to every NPC in Nord Settlement, Zender Gate, and Lake Lacrima. Character profiles update when you speak to NPCs at specific story moments.
steps.note: Check your notebook for new profile entries after each story progression point.

steps.text: **Save before entering the Watchtower.** Multiple boss fights ahead with no rest points between them.
**Jaeger Ambush at Nomadic Settlement** — Defeat the Jaeger squad before reaching the Watchtower. Buff and heal up beforehand.
steps.note: This fight occurs before the Watchtower. Be prepared.

steps.text: **BOSS: Altina & Bleublanc** (Watchtower Rooftop) — Focus Altina first (lower HP, high evasion). Bonus AP for defeating both within 40 turns.
steps.note: Use AoE when they're close together. Save S-Crafts for finishers.

steps.text: **MECH BATTLE: Valimar vs Spiegel + Drakkhen forces** — Focus Drakkhen Gun/Sword first, save strongest attack for Spiegel.
steps.note: The Airship RF30 is untargetable — ignore it.

sections.title: Act 1, Part 3: Legram
sections.content:
# Act 1, Part 3 — Legram

The final part of Act 1 takes you to the lakeside town of **Legram** and the mandatory story dungeon **Lohengrin Castle**. You'll travel via Ebel Highway, recruit Laura, and explore this picturesque knight's town.

Guest characters **Sharon**, **Claire**, or **Toval** are available for this segment.

<!-- checkpoint: arrive-legram | Arrive in Legram -->

## Ebel Highway

Travel south through Ebel Highway toward Legram. The highway has limited exploration initially but will fully unlock later.

**Key pickups:**
- **Flame Tongue (Quartz)** — Ebel Highway Area 2, near Valimar's resting spot
- **Celestial Balm** — side path chest
- **EP Charge II** — branching route
- **Tearal Balm** — before Legram entrance

> Not all highway areas are accessible yet. Return later for remaining chests.

## Legram Town

### Important Items (Missable Books & Recipes)
| Item | Location | Missable? |
|------|----------|----------|
| **Gambler Jack Reprint #4 (Book)** | General Store (buy) | Yes — chapter-specific stock |
| **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 6 (Book)** | Talk to Weiber at Aprikoze Inn | Yes — NPC dialogue only |
| **Gambler Jack Reprint #5 (Book)** | Buy from Fortnum Books, Bareahard (2F Christie's Galleria, Station Street) | Yes — chapter-specific stock |
| **Gambler Jack Reprint #6 (Book)** | Buy from Fortnum Books, Bareahard (2F Christie's Galleria, Station Street) | Yes — chapter-specific stock |
| **Seafood Pilaf (Recipe)** | Talk to Bem at Aprikoze Inn (backdoor entrance) | Yes |

> 🏆 **Achievement: Lending Library** — Buy Gambler Jack Reprints #4, #5, and #6 NOW. They may not be available later.

> 🏆 **Achievement: Wartime Rationer** — Get the Seafood Pilaf recipe from Bem. Check the inn backdoor.

<!-- checkpoint: legram-items-collected | Legram Books & Recipes Collected -->

## Side Quests

Check the quest board at the **Bracer Guild** in Legram:

- **Monster Extermination** — defeat a dangerous creature in the area surrounding Legram
- **Village requests** — fetch/delivery tasks for townsfolk
- **Ebel Rebel** — defeat bandit groups on Ebel Highway

### Missin' Kitten (Hidden Quest)
- **How to find:** Speak to **Maren** (the maid at the Legram inn)
- **Objective:** Find the missing kitten — check behind the inn, near the lake pier, and by the church. Return the kitten to Maren.
- **Availability:** Only during free time in Legram. **Missable!**

### St. Veronica's Tears (Hidden Quest)
- **How to find:** Speak to **Sister Olive** at the Legram church
- **Objective:** Locate a precious heirloom lost near the lake area. Search the dock area northwest of the inn.
- **Availability:** Only during free time. **Missable!**

### Stranger Than Fishin' (Hidden Quest)
- **How to find:** Talk to **Annabelle** at the pier/docks area in Legram
- **Objective:** Catch a **Kaleido Shark** at the designated fishing spot. Use the best available bait.
- **Reward:** Fishing trophy item + AP
- **Availability:** Only during free time. **Missable!**

> 🏆 **Achievement: The Reel Deal** — Catching the Kaleido Shark counts toward your fish collection.

### Arseid School Training Bout 2 (Side Quest)
- **Location:** Arseid School, speak to **Victor S. Arseid**
- **Objective:** Duel Laura's father in a challenging 1-on-1 training bout
- **Recommended Level:** 50+
- **Tips:** Guard his powerful slashes, counter-attack during recovery frames. Use Chrono Burst if available.
- **Availability:** Available after recruiting Laura. **Expires before entering Lohengrin Castle.**

> ⚠️ **ALL side quests expire when you enter Lohengrin Castle.** Complete every quest above first — including all hidden quests.

> 🏆 **Achievement: Honor Roll** — Missing ANY hidden quest (Missin' Kitten, St. Veronica's Tears, Stranger Than Fishin') locks you out of this achievement permanently.

## Bonding Events (Free Day)

During your free day in Legram, you receive **2 Bonding Points**:

**Available characters:** Laura, Fie, Emma, and other recruited members at Legram

> Legram bonding scenes are especially rich for Laura (her hometown) and Fie (Arseid connection). Save before choosing.

## Lohengrin Castle

<!-- checkpoint: lohengrin-castle | Enter Lohengrin Castle -->

The main mandatory dungeon of Act 1 Part 3. You travel by boat across the lake to reach **Lohengrin Castle**. This is a multi-floor dungeon with progressive difficulty. **Emma is a mandatory party member** for this dungeon.

### Treasure Chests (Key Items)
- **EP Charge III** — early floor chest
- **Lunar Robe** — armor upgrade for casters
- **All Sepith ×300** — large sepith haul
- **Fire Bell (Quartz)** — fire-element quartz
- **Celestial Balm** — premium healing item
- **Judgement Bolt** — powerful arts quartz
- **Rakshasa** — weapon (monster chest reward)
- **Zeram Powder** — monster chest reward

> Some chests are guarded by tough monster groups (Death Slugger ×4, Wandering Sword ×4). Prepare before opening glowing chests.

### Strategy Tips
- Analyze every new enemy with Battle Scope
- Watch for monster chests (tougher fights, better rewards)
- Use save points between floors

### Boss: Zelvenom

<!-- checkpoint: zelvenom-defeated | Boss Zelvenom Defeated -->

**Zelvenom** — the Gluttonous Lizard, a powerful cryptid boss.

- **Level:** 70
- **HP:** 63,490
- **Recommended Level:** 68–70
- **Weakness:** Apply debuffs and use arts-heavy strategy
- **Recommended Party:** Emma (mandatory) plus Sharon/Alisa or balanced party for healing/CP refill
- **Bonus AP:** Defeat without any party KOs
- **Strategy:** Buff party STR/DEF, apply ATK Down on boss, use S-Crafts when HP is lower. Clear minions first if they appear to reduce incoming damage.

> **Save before the boss room.** Use the last save point available.

After the boss, story events play and Act 1 Part 3 concludes.

<!-- checkpoint: act-1-part-3-complete | Act 1 Part 3 Complete -->

steps.note: Bonus AP for defeating without party KOs. Emma is mandatory for this fight.

sections.title: Intermission: Aboard the Pantagruel
sections.content:
# Intermission — Aboard the Pantagruel

The Intermission is a dramatic story chapter where Rean and allies are captured aboard the **Pantagruel**, a massive Noble Alliance airship. This chapter focuses on story revelations, gaining the Spirit Unification ability, and a dramatic escape sequence.

<!-- checkpoint: pantagruel-aboard | Aboard the Pantagruel -->

## Meeting the Villains

Visit rooms marked with red "!" exclamation marks to meet key antagonists:

**South Area:**
- **Scarlet** — Southeast Room
- **Vulcan** — Northeast Room

**Center:**
- **Bleublanc** — Dining Table (Center)

**North Area:**
- **Xeno & Leonidas** — Southeast Room
- **McBurn** — Northeast Room
- **Duvalie** — Southwest Room
- **Altina** — Northwest Room

After talking to everyone, go upstairs to the guest room for a story event with **Princess Alfin**. Rean gains the **Spirit Unification** ability — a powerful combat transformation.

<!-- checkpoint: spirit-unification | Gain Spirit Unification -->

## The Escape

Return to **Rean's room** (South Area, SW corner) and examine the **air ducts by the flower vase** to initiate the escape sequence. After the cutscenes, you must fight through the ship's corridors.

### Item Locations During Escape
- **Celestial Balm** — room to the west
- **Orange Cape** — room to the east
- **Tear All Balm** — as you continue south

### Enemy Encounters
| Enemy | HP | Drops |
|-------|------|-------|
| Alliance Forces Soldier | — | Teara Balm, EP Charge II |
| Tri-Attacker R2 | — | Teara Balm, U-Material |
| Tri-Attacker HG | — | EP Charge II, U-Material |
| Doven Kaiser | — | Red Beast Flesh, U-Material |
| Provincial Army Soldier | — | Teara Balm, EP Charge II |
| Phalanx J9 | — | Teara Balm, U-Material |

> Cancel enemy casting with Rean's **Autumn Leaf Cutter** craft. Prioritize Alfin's AoE arts for multi-target damage.

<!-- checkpoint: escape-battles | Escape Battle Sequence -->

### Orbment Charging Station

Before the boss fight, use the **Orbment Charging Station** to fully restore HP/EP.

## Boss: Duvalie & Bleublanc

- **Duvalie:** 85,316 HP, 90 elemental efficacy across all elements
- **Bleublanc:** 96,640 HP, 90 elemental efficacy across all elements
- **Win condition:** Reduce EITHER boss to 50% HP — you don't need to fully defeat them
- **Strategy:** Use an S-Craft immediately for massive burst damage on one target. Focus Duvalie (lower HP). Scan both for Monster Notebook entries!

> 🏆 **Achievement: Face of the Enemy** — Make sure to use Battle Scope on both Duvalie and Bleublanc. These are unique scans.

<!-- checkpoint: duvalie-bleublanc-defeated | Duvalie & Bleublanc Defeated -->

## Boss: Crow

After the escape sequence, a boss fight against **Crow** occurs. Full HP/EP recovery is provided before this fight.

- **Strategy:** Use Spirit Unification for massive damage boost. Keep up healing and apply debuffs. Crow uses powerful S-Crafts — guard or use your own S-Craft to interrupt.

> **Save at any opportunity** during the escape. Fights are back-to-back.

<!-- checkpoint: intermission-complete | Intermission Complete -->

steps.text: Visit **Scarlet** in the South Area, Southeast Room.
Visit **Vulcan** in the South Area, Northeast Room.
Speak to **Bleublanc** at the Dining Table (Center).
Visit **Xeno & Leonidas** in the North Area, Southeast Room.
Visit **McBurn** in the North Area, Northeast Room.
Visit **Duvalie** in the North Area, Southwest Room.
Visit **Altina** in the North Area, Northwest Room.
Go upstairs to the guest room for the **Princess Alfin** event. Rean gains **Spirit Unification**.
Return to **Rean's room** (South Area, SW corner) and examine the **air ducts by the flower vase** to initiate the escape.
Grab **Celestial Balm** from the room to the west during the escape.
Pick up **Orange Cape** from the room to the east.
Collect **Tear All Balm** as you continue south through corridors.
Use **Battle Scope** on both Duvalie and Bleublanc for unique Monster Notebook entries.
steps.note: These are unique scans available only here.

steps.text: Use the **Orbment Charging Station** to fully restore HP/EP before the boss fight.
**BOSS: Duvalie (85,316 HP) & Bleublanc (96,640 HP)** — Only need to reduce one to 50% HP. Use S-Craft burst on Duvalie (lower HP).
steps.note: 90 elemental efficacy on both. Physical damage recommended.

steps.text: **BOSS: Crow** — Full recovery provided before fight. Use Spirit Unification for damage boost, guard against his S-Crafts.
steps.note: Apply debuffs and keep HP high.

sections.title: Act 2, Part 1: Roer & Sachsen Iron Mine
sections.content:
# Act 2, Part 1 — Roer & Sachsen Iron Mine

Act 2 opens with the **Courageous airship** as your mobile base. You'll board the **Eisengraf** train to travel to the industrial city of **Roer** via **Spina Byroad** (watch for encounters and treasure chests along the route), recruit allies, explore the **Sachsen Iron Mine**, and engage in a major mech battle at **Schwarz Drache Barrier**.

<!-- checkpoint: courageous-base | Board the Courageous -->

## The Courageous Airship

The Courageous serves as your hub for Act 2. Key facilities:

- **Computer Terminal** — check available quests here
- **Towa** — party management, destination selection
- **Princess Alfin** — Phoenix Chapter medal exchange
- **Shop/Training areas** — unlock more functions by recruiting students

**Gaius** is a required party member for this section.

> Spend mira and sepith primarily on the four main characters you'll bring into boss fights. Resource optimization is crucial in Act 2.

## Roer City

<!-- checkpoint: arrive-roer | Arrive in Roer -->

### Story Progression

Visit these locations in Roer:
- **Reinford HQ** building (approach)
- **Roer Cathedral** (main hall)
- **Roer Airport**
- **Hugo** at RF Store
- **Instructor Mary** at upper residence
- **Linde** at Boronia Goods
- **Dvance's Diner** — Angelica joins your party after this event

### Extra AP Opportunity

> Before entering Sachsen Iron Mine, travel to **Schwarz Drache Barrier** on the Nortia Highway for a special scene granting **+2 AP**. Easy to miss!

<!-- checkpoint: roer-explored | Roer City Explored -->

## Side Quests

- **Recruiting Becky:** If you recruit Becky in Celdic before heading to Roer, you earn extra AP.
- Check the computer terminal aboard the Courageous for additional quests.

> ⚠️ Hidden quests may be available. Check the terminal and talk to all NPCs aboard the Courageous.

## Bonding Events (Courageous Free Day)

During the free time aboard the Courageous before Roer, you receive **3 Bonding Points**:

**Available characters:** All currently recruited Class VII members aboard the ship

- **Towa** has a special scene on the bridge
- **Princess Alfin** has bonding dialogue on the upper deck

> These bonding scenes are unique to the Courageous setting. Save before choosing.

## Books & Recipes — Roer

| Item | Location | Missable? |
|------|----------|----------|
| **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 7 (Book)** | Quest reward from **Freddy** at the Roer Institute of Technology | Yes |
| **Imperial Chronicle - Issue 4 (Book)** | **Tallys General Store** in Roer | Yes |
| **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 8 (Book)** | Talk to **Hoover** at Zender Gate (revisit via Courageous) | Yes — NPC dialogue only |
| **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 9 (Book)** | Talk to **Marco** at Celdic Grand Market (revisit via Courageous) | Yes — NPC dialogue only |
| **Gambler Jack Reprint #7 (Book)** | Buy from Kilte's Store, Nord Highlands (revisit via Courageous) | Yes |
| **Gambler Jack Reprint #8 (Book)** | Buy from Watteau's Store, Legram (revisit via Courageous) | Yes |
| **Gambler Jack Reprint #9 (Book)** | Buy from Plover Goods & Souvenirs, Ymir (revisit via Courageous) | Yes |
| **Gambler Jack Reprint #10 (Book)** | Buy from Cornette's General Goods, Celdic (revisit via Courageous) | Yes |
| **Rich Risotto (Recipe)** | Chef at Dvance's Diner | Yes |

> 🏆 **Achievement: Lending Library** — Don't skip Roer NPCs. Books from conversations are easily missed. Also revisit previous towns via the Courageous for new Gambler Jack II chapters and Reprints.

> 🏆 **Achievement: Wartime Rationer** — Get Rich Risotto from the diner before leaving Roer.

## Sachsen Iron Mine

<!-- checkpoint: sachsen-mine | Enter Sachsen Iron Mine -->

### Enemies in the Mine
- **Jaeger - Gun:** Ranged attacks, can stagger
- **Jaeger - Sword:** High physical damage, close range
- **Blade Cougar:** Fast, high evasion

**Strategy:** Buff early, focus fire one enemy at a time. Use AoE crafts to soften groups.

### Mine Progression
Fight through waves of Jaeger and beast enemies. Collect chests on side paths. Use save points between major encounters.

## Schwarz Drache Barrier — Mech Battle

<!-- checkpoint: goliath-mech-battle | Goliath Mech Battle -->

**Divine Knight Battle: Valimar vs Goliath**

- **Goliath:** Heavy mech with strong physical attacks
- **Strategy:** Use Valimar's defensive stance when Goliath charges big attacks. Strike weak points when revealed. Keep HP above 50%.
- **Reward:** Story progression + large soul reward

## Train Battle Sequence

<!-- checkpoint: train-battles | Train Battle Sequence -->

After Schwarz Drache, you board a freight train and fight through Cars 5 to Car 1, with progressively tougher enemies in each car.

- **Car 5–4:** Standard soldiers and mechs
- **Car 3–2:** Stronger Jaeger types
- **Car 1:** Boss — **Vulcan & Scarlet**

> **Save between cars when possible.** Resources do not refill between fights.

### Boss: Vulcan & Scarlet (Car 1)

- **Vulcan:** Physical attacker in a Panzer Soldat. Powerful single-target and line attacks, can inflict AT Delay.
- **Scarlet:** Arts-based attacker with long-range magic. Can heal/buff herself and deal devastating AoE damage.
- **Strategy:** Focus **Scarlet first** — she has lower HP and her AoE arts are more dangerous. Use impede crafts or AT Delay to interrupt her casting. After Scarlet falls, focus Vulcan. Stack defense buffs early and keep HP above 50% at all times.
- **Tips:** Equip accessories that resist Mute/Seal. Save CP from earlier cars for S-Crafts here.

### Guest Character Accessories

Guest characters (Claire, Sharon, Toval) carry **powerful equipped accessories**. Before each guest leaves your party, make sure to **unequip their accessories** — you lose access to any equipment still on them when they depart.

> ⚠️ Open the Equipment menu and strip all gear from guest characters before major story transitions.

<!-- checkpoint: act-2-part-1-complete | Act 2 Part 1 Complete -->

sections.title: Act 2, Part 2: Cryptids & Regrouping
sections.content:
# Act 2, Part 2 — Cryptids & Regrouping

Part 2 of Act 2 focuses on revisiting previous areas from the Courageous, hunting powerful **Cryptid** optional bosses, completing side quests, and strengthening your party before the major operations ahead.

<!-- checkpoint: act-2-part-2-start | Act 2 Part 2 Begins -->

## Courageous Activities

### On-Ship Interactions
- **Celine** (3F Front Deck) — character profile updates
- **Alfin** — Medal of Charity exchange
- **Millium** — mandatory party member for this segment
- **Blade II** card game — play with friends to boost Link EXP with Rean

### Party Setup
- **Millium** is mandatory for this act
- Consider enhancing Valimar using Ex-Orbs (Attack 2 & Action 2 quartz + 20 U-Materials) for upcoming mech battles
- Speak to **Towa** to unlock Celdic as a Courageous destination

<!-- checkpoint: courageous-setup | Courageous Setup Complete -->

## Books & Collectibles

| Item | Location | Missable? |
|------|----------|----------|
| **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 10 (Book)** | Talk to **Logg** at Dvance's Diner, Roer | Yes — NPC dialogue only |
| **Imperial Chronicle - Issue 5 (Book)** | Buy from previous news stores, Thors Campus Store, or Literature Club on the Courageous | Yes |
| **Gambler Jack Reprint #11 (Book)** | Buy from Boronia's General Goods, Roer (revisit via Courageous) | Yes |
| **Gambler Jack Reprint #12 (Book)** | Buy from Boronia's General Goods, Roer (revisit via Courageous) | Yes |

> 🏆 **Achievement: Lending Library** — Pick up Gambler Jack II Ch.10 and Imperial Chronicle Issue 5 during this phase. Don't forget Reprint volumes at Roer.

## Cryptid Battles (Optional, Earn AP)

### Cryptid: Heidrun — Lunaria Nature Park
- Travel back to **Lunaria Nature Park** via the Courageous
- **Heidrun** (~253,155 HP) — inflicts Sleep, Poison, and Blind. Uses **Ragna Vortex** AoE for 5,000–7,000 damage.
- **Strategy:** Equip accessories for sleep/poison/blind resistance. Keep party spread out to minimize Ragna Vortex hits. Use Emma's Crescent Shell for magic reflect.
- **Recommended Level:** 55+
- **Reward:** Bonus AP at chapter end

### Cryptid: Nereid — Nord Highlands – South
- Another Cryptid near the stone monument in **Nord Highlands – South**
- **Nereid** (~266,150 HP) — powerful AoE attacks. Drops **Glimmering Star Gem** (Lost Arts quartz).
- **Strategy:** Arts reflect and keeping party spread out are key. Strike-type attacks are most effective.
- **Recommended Level:** 55+
- **Reward:** Bonus AP at chapter end + Glimmering Star Gem

> Both Cryptid battles are optional but grant significant AP bonuses. Worth doing for completionists.

<!-- checkpoint: cryptids-defeated | Cryptid Bosses Defeated -->

## Ymir Revisit

### Available Activities
- **Cheese Fondue Recipe** — Buy the recipe book at the general store
- **Snowboarding mini-game** — a new obstacle has been added
- **Phoenix Wings** — speak to Baggins for a special side quest

> 🏆 **Achievement: Wartime Rationer** — Buy the Cheese Fondue Recipe. Missable if you don't visit Ymir now.

### Creeping for Creeps (Side Quest)
- **Start:** Speak to Baggins at The Phoenix Wings in Ymir
- **Objective:** Snowboard mini-game — chase and catch two snow sheep
- **Reward:** 2 bonus AP (can retry until successful) + mini-boss fight after
- **Availability:** Only available during this Act 2 Part 2 revisit

<!-- checkpoint: ymir-revisit-done | Ymir Revisit Complete -->

## Additional Quests

Check the Courageous terminal for quest list:
- **I'll Make a Mech Out of You** — main story progression quest
- **Just Getting Wormed Up** — main story progression quest

> 🏆 **Achievement: Honor Roll** — Don't skip town revisits.

> ⚠️ All side quests in Act 2 Part 2 expire when you advance to Part 3. Clear them all.

<!-- checkpoint: act-2-part-2-complete | Act 2 Part 2 Complete -->

steps.text: Play **Blade II** with every available party member on the Courageous.
steps.note: Missable — some matches are time-limited.

Speak to **Towa** to unlock Celdic as a Courageous travel destination.

steps.text: **OPTIONAL BOSS: Heidrun** in Lunaria Nature Park (~253,155 HP) — inflicts Sleep/Poison/Blind. Uses Ragna Vortex AoE (5,000–7,000 dmg). Equip status resist accessories, keep party spread out.
steps.note: Travel via Courageous. Significant AP reward.

steps.text: **OPTIONAL BOSS: Nereid** near stone monument in Nord Highlands – South (~266,150 HP). Drops **Glimmering Star Gem** (Lost Arts). Strike attacks most effective.
steps.note: Another bonus AP reward. Use arts reflect and spread party.

steps.text: Buy **Cheese Fondue Recipe** book at the Ymir general store.
steps.note: Required for Wartime Rationer achievement. Only available during this revisit.

Complete **Creeping for Creeps**: speak to Baggins at Phoenix Wings, then catch two snow sheep in the snowboard mini-game.
