sections.title: Act 2, Part 3: December 23–26
sections.content:
# Act 2, Part 3 — December 23–26

Act 2, Part 3 covers operations from the Courageous, including NPC recruitment, side quests, Spirit Shrine trials, and the Celdic/Aurochs Fort liberation operation culminating in the apprehension of Duke Albarea. It ends with bonding events in Bareahard.

## December 23 — Courageous & Regional Operations

<!-- checkpoint: act-2-part-3-start | Act 2 Part 3 Begins -->

### Courageous Preparations

When you regain control:
- Talk to **Towa** twice on the Bridge for new locations (Eisengard Range, Roer Region)
- Speak to **Emily** and **Alan** at 4F Training Facility (updates their profiles)
- Speak to **Alfin** for a short event
- Speak to **Dorothee** on 2F — purchase the **Pasta Recipe Book** from her (teaches **Rich Carbonara**)
- Play Blade with classmates for Link EXP
- Speak to **Angelica** on 1F Workshop (updates her profile)
- Head to 2F Infirmary — examine the card on the desk to start "The Sweetest of Challenges"

> Note: The final two Cryptids also appear now — one at Nortia Highway 2 and one at Eisengard Mountain 2.

### Books & Recipes (Missable!)

| Item | Source | Notes |
|------|--------|-------|
| **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 11** | Talk to **Rex** at Schwarz Drache Barrier | Missable! NPC dialogue only |
| **Black Records #4** | Talk to **Norton** at Roer Airport | **Second Playthrough only** |
| **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 12** | Talk to **Maicel** at Alouette Inn, Bareahard (12/26) | Missable! NPC dialogue only |
| **Rich Carbonara (Recipe)** | Purchase Pasta Recipe Book from General Store (Ymir) or Dorothee | — |
| **Tomato Stew (Recipe)** | Talk to the lady by the counter at Schwarz Drache Barrier resting area | — |
| **Fruit Parfait (Recipe)** | Talk to **Giolamo** at Alouette Inn counter (12/26) | — |

> 🏆 **Achievement: Lending Library** — Gambler Jack II chapters are missable NPC dialogue items. Grab them on the correct dates.

### Side Quests

| Quest | Client | Reward | Details |
|-------|--------|--------|--------|
| **The Sweetest of Challenges** | Phantom Thief Bleublanc | Thief Cloak, 3500 Mira, 3(+2) AP | Examine card in 2F Infirmary. Class VII gathers — listen to opinions, then **pick Machias (2nd choice)** as the culprit for +2 bonus AP |
| **Gone Air** | Klein & Hibelle | Wrath, 4000 Mira, 4 AP | Set destination to Eisengard Range. Board the airship from end of Chapter 1. Fight Jaegers, collect Card Key 1 (NW room) & Card Key 2 (3rd floor), defeat all 5 groups of Jaegers. Klein & Hibelle join Courageous |
| **Kreuzen for a Bruisin'** | Prince Olivert | Intimidation, 3000 Mira, 4 AP | Travel to East Celdic Highway 2 → North Kreuzen Highway 3. Boss: **Abearddon** (132,446 HP) at SW end. Very slow, good for Link Attack farming. Rolling attack hits hard but boss is very slow |

### Recruiting NPCs

| Character | Location | Steps |
|-----------|----------|-------|
| **Hugo** | RF Store (Roer) | Accept request → visit Watteau's Store (Legram) → Ymir General Store (Lio) → visit snowboard area (new course) → return to Hugo in Roer. Opens premium store on Courageous |
| **Stefan** | Roer Institute of Technology (NW Building 2F) | Talk to Ratto → leave town to Nortia Highway 2 (SW corner). **Bring Machias** for event battle. Stefan joins Courageous and gives rewards based on battle notes data |
| **Kenneth** | Nortia Highway 3 (fishing spot, NW of map) | Accept request → catch a **Glutinous Bass** at the fishing spot right beside him. Kenneth joins and lets you exchange fishing points |
| **Margarita** | Schwarz Drache Barrier (resting area) | **Bring Millium**. Margarita joins Courageous. Give her Peculiar Dishes for item rewards; give ALL Peculiar Dishes for a rare quartz |
| **Klein & Hibelle** | Eisengard Range | Complete "Gone Air" quest. Hibelle unlocks Arts Training Facility (4F). Klein joins Bridge (5F) |

After recruiting, speak to **Nicholas** in the cafeteria to update his profile. Speak to **Klein** at the Bridge to update his.

### Trial Chests

Obtain any trial chests you missed from the previous act, plus new ones:

| Location | Characters | Boss |
|----------|-----------|------|
| Eisengard Range | Fie & Laura | **Rolling Rock** (42,809 HP) — High physical DEF; use arts. Vulnerable to Faint (Fie's Scud Wing, Laura's Brilliant Spin). Use Tearal for healing. S-Craft below 50% HP |
| Spina Byroad | Alisa & Emma | — |
| Nortia Highway | Elliot, Emma, Millium & Sara | — |
| Sachsen Mountain | Elliot & Gaius | — |

After clearing the Eisengard Trial Chest, three new enemies appear: Shadow Dancer, Venom Demon, and Steel Golem.

### Cryptids (December 23)

- **Agnagarn** — Nortia Highway 2 (SE end)
- **Lindbaum** — Eisengard Range (starting area). The hardest Cryptid in the game.
- Defeating all 5 Cryptids → speak to **Alfin** for **Medal of Strength**

### Spirit Shrine Trials (Part A)

Revisit all shrines — new Trial areas are accessible. **Bring Emma** to unlock the gates. All shrines are marked with red "!" on the world map. After clearing one shrine, a story event interrupts. Remaining shrines are completed later.

> ⚠️ **The boss at the end of each shrine depends on how many shrines you've cleared** (not which specific shrine). First shrine cleared always faces **Magic Knight Direwolf**.

| Shrine | Element | Key Mechanic | Required Proficiency | Notable Treasure |
|--------|---------|--------------|---------------------|------------------|
| **Terra** | Earth | Hit walls to create bridges | Strike B+ (Laura/Millium/Machias) | Earth Sepith ×1000, Ancient Glyph, Tear All Balm, Genbu, Earth Bell |
| **Aria** | Wind | Activate green switches | Pierce B+ (Alisa/Fie/Machias/Sara) | Ragna Vortex, Wind Bell, Celestial Balm EX, Wind Sepith ×2000, **Zeus Gem** |
| **Aqua** | Water | Activate switches to drain water | Thrust B+ (Fie/Gaius/Jusis/Sara) | Maelstrom, Yaksha, EP Charge IV, Curia Balm, Water Bell, Water Sepith ×1000 |
| **Ignis** | Fire | Extinguish lamps with Rean's field attack | — | Fire Sepith ×1000, Purgatorial Flame, Fire Bell, Carnage |

> ⚠️ **DO NOT leave Aria Shrine without the Zeus Gem** — essential for the Cancelling strategy on Final Dungeon bosses, especially McBurn.

**Trial Chest bosses within shrines:**
- Terra: Minos Lord (62,400 HP) for Alisa/Fie; Dino Slug (46,944 HP) for Machias/Millium
- Aria: Clay Doll Omega (50,016 HP) for Fie/Millium; two bosses for Jusis/Sara
- Aqua: Grand Ghastly (45,984 HP) for Laura/Millium; Gigantic Sharkodile (77,760 HP) for Alisa/Machias
- Ignis: Homuramikoto (46,848 HP) for Alisa/Sara; Arch Geist (46,752 HP) for Emma/Machias

**Beryl** is found at Terra Shrine entrance — speak to her to update her character profile.

#### End of 1st Shrine — Boss: Magic Knight Direwolf

- **HP:** 156,170
- **Skills:** Ground Punch (single), Ground Smash (frontal AoE), Boost (STR/DEF/SPD +25% and heals 23,000 HP)
- **Strategy:** Immune to status effects. Focus on self-buffing for maximum damage. Use arts against it. When it uses Boost at 75% HP, burst it down quickly — prolonging the fight is dangerous due to accumulated buffs.
- After defeating the boss, grab the **Zemurian Crystal** at the top.

Leave the shrine for an event, then speak to **George** in Courageous 1F. Select the option highlighted in red to advance the main story.

## December 24 & 25 — Celdic Operation

<!-- checkpoint: celdic-operation | Celdic Operation Begins -->

### Preparations

New character profiles available: Linde [2], Loggins [1], Fiedelio [2], Sara [2], Jusis [2]

**Jusis and Sara** are fixed party members. Speak to Fiedelio (Computer Room 2F), Loggins (Sword Training 4F), and Linde (Bridge 5F) to update profiles.

Survey key events in Celdic:
- Chapel south room
- **Otto** (Manager House 2F)
- **Claire** (Army Guardhouse entrance)

After viewing all three, head to east exit for a scene. You return to Courageous — equip your party and Valimar with best Ex-Orbs.

### Mech Battle: Kestrel

- **HP:** 260,000
- **Idle Stance:** Body ★★☆☆, Head ★☆☆☆, Arms ★☆☆☆
- **Attack Stance (Slash):** Body ☆☆☆☆, Head ★★★☆, Arms ★☆☆☆
- **Attack Stance (Thrust):** Body ★☆☆☆, Head ☆☆☆☆, Arms ★★★☆
- **Strategy:** No 4-star weakness. Similar to Neihardt's Spiegel. High miss rate on your attacks. Save CP for counter ability or use Seal (last CP ability) when it stance-changes. Not as hard as previous mech battles.

### Sara Solo Battle

After the mech fight, Sara fights a group of Jaegers alone. She unlocks her **final S-Craft** — use it against the Jaegers. When CP recharges, use it again. Afterwards, you arrive at Aurochs Fort without Sara.

### Aurochs Fort

<!-- checkpoint: aurochs-fort | Aurochs Fort Dungeon -->

**Enemy List:** Vogel XX, Beep Seeker III, Phalanx J9, Provincial Army Soldier, Kazakh Doven G, B-Zephyranthes, Provincial Army Officer

**1F Treasures:** Curia Balm, Cast 2, Celestial Balm EX, Tear All Balm, Sepith ×200, Hellfire (monster chest)

**Navigation (1F):**
1. Go north to far east → enter room directly south → hit switch to unlock center gate
2. West path: first room south has Curia Balm; SW end has Cast 2
3. NE path: first room has Celestial Balm EX; follow NE all the way to air duct
4. Through duct to SE area → hit switch on left to unlock center gate
5. Center has Hellfire (monster chest); SW room has Sepith
6. SE entrance leads to 2F

**2F Treasures:** Chrono Burst, Tearal, HP 2, EP Charge IV, U-Material ×8

**Navigation (2F):**
1. North to center (gate blocks you) → left side air duct → Chrono Burst + switch
2. SW corner duct → SE corner: Tearal + switch
3. NW corner duct → north section: SE switch → HP 2 past gate
4. Continue north to another duct → west room has EP Charge IV; NE room has U-Material ×8
5. NE exit leads to 3F (boss room)

Heal at Orbment Station on 3F before the boss.

### Boss: Duvalie (203,010 HP) + Sleipnir ×2 (76,000 HP each)

<!-- checkpoint: duvalie-defeated | Duvalie Defeated — Duke Albarea Apprehended -->

- **Duvalie:** Slash ☆☆☆☆, Thrust ★☆☆☆, Pierce ☆☆☆☆, Strike ★☆☆☆
- **Sleipnir:** Slash ★★☆☆, Thrust ★★☆☆, Pierce ★★☆☆, Strike ★★★☆
- **Strategy:** Eliminate Sleipnir ASAP with S-Crafts. Duvalie has high HP. Her attacks cause confusion or freeze — position your tank/attacker at the front to draw aggro and prevent her AoE from hitting your whole party.
- **Below 60% HP:** Duvalie may use **Prism Calibur** (S-Craft, 10,000–13,000 damage = instant KO). Have Jusis cast **Platinum Shield** or use **Adamantine Shield** as preemptive protection.

## December 26 — Bareahard

<!-- checkpoint: bareahard-bonding | Bareahard Bonding Events -->

### Collectibles
- **Recipe: Fruit Parfait** — speak to Giolamo at Alouette Inn counter
- **Book: Gambler Jack II - Chapter 12** — speak to Maicel at Alouette Inn table
- **Bike Colour: Windy Colour** — drawer in Jusis' room (Duke's Mansion)

### Bonding Events (5 Bonding Points)

| Character | Location | Notes |
|-----------|----------|-------|
| Alisa | Central Plaza | +800 Link EXP |
| Alfin | Bareahard Airport | +800 Link EXP. **Required for final partner event (Dec 30)** |
| Elliot | Station Street (West exit) | +800 Link EXP |
| Emma | Noble District | +800 Link EXP |
| Fie | Artisan Street | +800 Link EXP, adds Fie [Page 2] profile |
| Gaius | Bareahard Cathedral | +800 Link EXP, adds Gaius [Page 3] profile |
| Jusis | Duke's Mansion | +800 Link EXP |
| Laura | Station Street (East exit) | +800 Link EXP |
| Machias | Christie's Galleria | +800 Link EXP, adds Machias [Page 2] profile |
| Millium | Christie's Galleria | +800 Link EXP |
| Sara | Alouette Inn | +800 Link EXP |
| Towa | Station Street (North exit) | +800 Link EXP, adds Towa [Page 2] profile |

> 🏆 One condition for the bonding trophy requires attending events on this date. **Keep a backup save.** Attending Alfin's event unlocks her final partner event on December 30.

When done, go to Bareahard Airport and board the Courageous to end the day.

### AP Results — Act 2, Part 3 (38 AP = S Rank)

| Task | AP |
|------|-----|
| Cleared a Spirit Shrine | 3 |
| Apprehended Duke Albarea | 10 |
| Recruited Kenneth | 2 |
| Recruited Margarita | 2 |
| Recruited Hugo | 2 |
| Recruited Stefan | 2 |
| Recruited Klein | 2 |
| Recruited Hibelle | 2 |
| Quest: Gone Air | 4 |
| Quest: The Sweetest of Challenges | 3 (+2) |
| Quest: Kreuzen for a Bruisin' | 4 |
| **Total for S Rank** | **38** |

<!-- checkpoint: act-2-part-3-complete | Act 2 Part 3 Complete -->

steps.text: Talk to **Towa** twice on the Bridge for new locations (Eisengard Range, Roer Region). Visit Emily/Alan (4F), Angelica (1F) to update profiles.
Purchase **Pasta Recipe Book** from **Dorothee** (2F) or Ymir General Store — teaches **Rich Carbonara** recipe.
steps.note: Available from Dorothee on the Courageous.

steps.text: Complete **The Sweetest of Challenges**: Examine card in 2F Infirmary. Class VII gathers — listen to opinions then **pick Machias (2nd choice)** as culprit for +2 bonus AP.
steps.note: Reward: Thief Cloak, 3500 Mira, 3(+2) AP. Picking Emma gives only 1 AP.

steps.text: Recruit **Hugo**: RF Store (Roer) → accept request → Watteau's Store (Legram) → Ymir General Store (Lio) → return to Hugo. Opens premium store on Courageous.
steps.note: Also visit the snowboard area in Ymir — a new course has been added.

steps.text: Recruit **Stefan**: Roer Institute (NW Building 2F), talk to Ratto → Nortia Highway 2 (SW corner). **Bring Machias** for event battle.

steps.text: Recruit **Kenneth**: Nortia Highway 3 (NW fishing spot). Accept request, catch a **Glutinous Bass** at the spot right beside him.

steps.text: Recruit **Margarita**: Schwarz Drache Barrier resting area. **Bring Millium** in your party. Give Peculiar Dishes for item rewards.

steps.text: Talk to **Rex** at **Schwarz Drache Barrier** gate entrance for **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 11**. Also updates Rex's character bio.

steps.text: Talk to the lady by the counter at **Schwarz Drache Barrier** resting area for **Tomato Stew** recipe.
Complete **Gone Air**: Set destination to Eisengard Range via Towa. Board the airship, fight Jaegers through all floors, collect Card Key 1 & 2. **Klein & Hibelle join Courageous.**
steps.note: Reward: Wrath, 4000 Mira, 4 AP. Don't forget Freeze Quartz in NW corner if missed from Ch.1. Hibelle unlocks Arts Training Facility (4F).

steps.text: **Second Playthrough only:** Talk to **Norton** at Roer Airport for **Black Records #4** (after clearing Gone Air quest).
steps.note: Only available on NG+ or later.

steps.text: Clear Trial Chest at **Eisengard Range** (Fie & Laura). Boss: **Rolling Rock** (42,809 HP) — high physical DEF, weak to Strike. Use arts and Faint (Scud Wing/Brilliant Spin). S-Craft below 50%.

steps.text: Complete **Kreuzen for a Bruisin'**: Travel to North Kreuzen Highway (via East Celdic Hwy 2). Boss: **Abearddon** (132,446 HP) at SW end. Very slow, good for Link Attack farming.

steps.text: **OPTIONAL: Cryptid Agnagarn** at Nortia Highway 2 (SE end). Available December 23.

steps.text: **OPTIONAL: Cryptid Lindbaum** at Eisengard Range (starting area). The hardest Cryptid. Available December 23.

steps.text: Enter one **Spirit Shrine** with **Emma** in party. Boss depends on how many shrines cleared (1st = Magic Knight Direwolf, 156,170 HP). Grab **Zemurian Crystal** after boss. Report to George on Courageous.

steps.text: ⚠️ **DO NOT leave Aria Shrine without the Zeus Gem** (monster chest, SE area after lowering platforms). Essential for Cancelling strategy on Final Dungeon bosses, especially McBurn.

December 24–25: **Jusis and Sara** are fixed party. Survey Celdic key events: Chapel south room, Otto (Manager House 2F), Claire (Army Guardhouse). Equip Valimar with best Ex-Orbs before speaking to Towa.
**MECH BATTLE: Kestrel** (260,000 HP). No 4-star weakness. Save CP for counter/Seal when it stance-changes. Idle: Body ★★☆☆. Slash stance: Head ★★★☆. Thrust stance: Arms ★★★☆.
Sara fights Jaegers solo and unlocks her **final S-Craft**. Use it twice (once per full CP charge).
Navigate **Aurochs Fort** (2 floors). Key treasures: Hellfire (1F monster chest), Chrono Burst (2F), Tearal, HP 2. Use air ducts and switches to progress. Heal at Orbment Station on 3F before boss.

**BOSS: Duvalie** (203,010 HP) + **Sleipnir ×2** (76,000 HP each). Eliminate Sleipnir first with S-Crafts. Duvalie causes confusion/freeze. Below 60% HP she uses Prism Calibur (10k–13k dmg, instant KO).
steps.note: Use Jusis's Platinum Shield or Adamantine Shield before she hits 60% HP as protection.

steps.text: December 26: Talk to **Maicel** at **Alouette Inn** (Bareahard) for **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 12**.
steps.note: Missable! NPC dialogue only.

steps.text: Talk to **Giolamo** at Alouette Inn counter for **Fruit Parfait** recipe.
Collect **Windy Colour** bike colour from drawer in Jusis' room (Duke's Mansion).

steps.note: Keep a backup save! One bonding trophy condition requires attending events on this date. Each event gives +800 Link EXP.

steps.text: When finished, go to Bareahard Airport and board the Courageous to end the day. AP tally: 38 AP = S Rank.

sections.title: Act 2, Part 4: Liberating Trista
sections.content:
# Act 2, Part 4 — Liberating Trista

After completing the remaining Spirit Shrines, the story quest **"Liberating Trista"** begins. Complete all side content before commencing the operation.

## Pre-Battle Setup (December 27–30)

<!-- checkpoint: act-2-part-4-start | Act 2 Part 4 Begins -->

### Books (Missable!)

| Item | Source | Notes |
|------|--------|-------|
| **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 13** | Talk to **Spare** at Crescent Moon Inn, Aurochs Fort (12/27) | Missable! NPC dialogue only |
| **Gambler Jack Reprint #13** | Buy from Fortnum Books, Bareahard (revisit via Courageous) | Yes |
| **Gambler Jack Reprint #14** | Buy from Fortnum Books, Bareahard (revisit via Courageous) | Yes |

> 🏆 **Achievement: Lending Library** — Don't miss Chapter 13 and the final Reprints.

### Recipes

| Item | Source |
|------|--------|
| **Spicy Curry (Recipe)** | Purchase the Curry Recipe Book from the General Store (Courageous) |
| **Mixed Grill (Recipe)** | Talk to Josef at Arseid Mansion (Legram) |

### Remaining Spirit Shrines

Complete the remaining three Spirit Shrines (see Part 3 for shrine details). Each awards a Zemurian Ore.

### Side Quests (Available before commencing)

| Quest | Notes |
|-------|-------|
| **Mist Opportunity** | Available before operation |
| **Canyon, or CAN'Tyon?** | Available before operation |
| **Hearts in Harmony** | Available before operation |
| **Father's Pocket Watch (Hidden)** | Multi-step quest: Accept from Jackass at Jackass's Repair Shop (Roer) → Talk to Harves & Gregor (Roer Institute entrance) → Mine Chief Rudolf (outside Sachsen Iron Mines) → Miner Aman (inside Sachsen Iron Mines, Freight Station) → Old Man Gwyn (Lake Lacrima by the Truck) → Report back to Jackass. Requires Alisa in party. |

> ⚠️ **Point of no return:** Once you "Commence Operation", all remaining side quests become unavailable. Complete everything first!

> 🏆 **Achievement: Honor Roll** — Complete ALL quests including Father's Pocket Watch (hidden). Requires Alisa in your party.

### Pre-Battle Preparations

- Speak to **Towa** and pick "Commence Operation" to start
- **Monica** (4th floor) — gives a **Kaiser Burger** before the battle
- Play **Blade II** with one last character for Link EXP

<!-- checkpoint: trista-pre-battle-done | Pre-Battle Preparations Done -->

## The Liberation Battle

<!-- checkpoint: liberating-trista | Begin Liberating Trista -->

You control **two teams** simultaneously:
- **Team A:** Rean + Towa (forced) + your choices
- **Team B:** Angelica (forced) + your choices

> Equip all party members before commencing — no gear changes during consecutive battles.

### Battle Sequence

1. **Mech Battle:** Multiple Soldat mechs (Goliath B, Kestrel B) using Valimar with Team A
2. **Team B Fight:** Vincent, Sariffa, Edel, and Friedel
3. **Team A Fight:** Patrick, Celestin, Ferris, and Lambert

**Tips:**
- Have offensive quartz on strong attackers (Rean, Laura, Gaius, Millium)
- Support/cancel quartz for Emma/Fie
- Ensure everyone's ARCUS slots are upgraded to Level 2
- Sara does NOT participate in these battles

<!-- checkpoint: trista-liberated | Trista Liberated -->

> After liberating Trista, major story events play leading into the Finale.

<!-- checkpoint: act-2-complete | Act 2 Complete -->

Equip ALL party members for both Team A and Team B before commencing.
steps.note: No gear changes possible during consecutive battles.

steps.text: **MECH BATTLE: Valimar vs Goliath B + Kestrel B** — Focus one Soldat at a time. Use defensive stance on charge attacks.

**Team B then Team A battles** — Team B faces Vincent, Sariffa, Edel, and Friedel. Team A faces Patrick, Celestin, Ferris, and Lambert. Use offensive quartz on attackers, support quartz on healers. ARCUS Level 2 recommended. Focus Sariffa/Celestin first (they heal).

sections.title: Finale: Forward, Relentlessly
sections.content:
# Finale — Forward, Relentlessly

The Finale spans December 30–31 and takes you through a massive amount of preparation, the **Karel Imperial Villa** assault, and culminates in the **Infernal Castle** — a multi-layer dungeon with the game's toughest boss gauntlet (5 consecutive boss rounds). Complete all remaining side content before entering.

<!-- checkpoint: finale-start | December 30 Night — Pre-Castle Activities -->

## December 30 Night — Trista & Thors Activities

After regaining control, handle these activities before proceeding:

### Collectibles & Recipes
- **Tomato Pot (Recipe)** — Talk to **Lotte** at the Upper Dorm Entrance
- **Gambler Jack II Ch.14** — Talk to **Karol** in Thors Library
- **Zemurian Ore** — Talk to **Vice Principal Heinrich** at Kirsche's Café & Inn (requires all 14 Gambler Jack II chapters collected)
- **Bike Colour: Fiery Colour** — Examine the bookshelf in **Trista House** (northeast of Trista), right of the staircase on the bottom floor
- **Imperial Chronicle - Issue 6** — Buy from any book store

### Character Profiles (Missable!)
Update all character profiles by speaking to NPCs in Trista and Thors. There are many — see source guide for full list including Crow, Butler Celestin, Theresia, Instructor Mary, Principal Vandyck, Vivi, Clara, Bridget, Stefan, Lambert, Hugo, Casper, Colette, Rosine, Friedel, Instructor Thomas, Vice Principal Heinrich.

### Chosen Partner Event
Speak with your chosen bond partner for a special scene. Requirements:
- **Class VII members:** Link Level 6+ AND character has seen one of the 2 Key Bonding Events
- **Towa and Alfin:** Link Level 5+ AND have seen their Bonding Event in Bareahard at the end of Act 3

Finish all side activities first, then speak to your partner and choose the 1st option. Enter the Class VII dorm to trigger the event. If partner reaches Link Level 7, you also earn the **Link Master** trophy.

> 🏆 **Achievement: Chosen One** — View a Chosen Partner Event. **Link Master** — Reach Link Level 7 with your partner.

### Medal of Love
If you haven't received it yet, speak to **Alfin** at the Principal's Office to get the **Medal of Love**. Then take the west exit of Trista for an event, and speak to **Towa** at the school rooftop.

## December 31 — Courageous & Final Preparations

<!-- checkpoint: dec-31-preparations | December 31 — Courageous Preparations -->

Rean learns his **final S-Craft**. Update character profiles on the Courageous (George, Mint, Loggins, Edel, Becky, Patrick, Margarita, Ferris, Vincent, Sariffa, Instructor Makarov, Instructor Beatrix).

### Zemurian Ore Weapons
Speak to **George** on Courageous 1F to forge the strongest weapon in the game using the Zemurian Ore. Best candidates: **Rean and Laura** (crucial for the Cancelling strategy).

### Cooking & Dish Rewards
- Give all **22 superb dishes** to **Monica** (2F Cafeteria) → **Impenetrable Shield** quartz
- Give all **peculiar dishes** to **Margarita** (2F north corridor) → **Chaos** quartz
- Give all **unique dishes** to **Bridget** (3F) → **Revolution** quartz
- Discover all 22 recipes, then speak to **Ferris** (Game Room) → **Genesis** master quartz

### Training Modules
Complete all 5 stages of each training module on the Courageous for master quartz rewards:
- **Sword Training Facility** (Chevalier MQ) — Win conditions focus on no arts, no KO, evade + counterattack
- **Shooting Range Facility** (Cypher MQ) — Similar win conditions with crafts restrictions
- **Arts Training Facility** (Magius MQ) — No crafts, reflect magic, no items

Speak to **Towa** after completing all training → **Emblem** master quartz (for recruiting all students).

### Fishing
If you've caught 23 different fish types, speak to **Annabelle** in Ymir Valley for an event → catch the **Arch Tyrant**. Catching it unlocks the **Aeolus Gem** for purchase. Speak to **Kenneth** at the Cafeteria → **Orochi** master quartz. Also purchase the **Sennin Gem** from Kenneth.

### Optional Dungeon: Glacia Shrine
Speak to **Rean's father** at Baron's Mansion in Ymir → unlocks **Glacia Shrine** (west end of Ymir Valley 1). Defeat the boss for the **Ice Crown** accessory (+10 CP Regen/turn, +50% Critical Up).

> 🏆 **Achievement: The Frost Hunter** — Defeat the Glacia Shrine boss.

### Battle Notes
You should have 284 battle notes at this point. Speak to **Stefan** in the Computer Room (2F) → **Calamity** master quartz. If at 283, you may be missing the **Metal Beetle** (available after Dec 18 at Twin Dragon Bridge - Garrelia Side).

### Black Records (NG+ Only)
If this is a second playthrough with all Black Records collected, give them to **Instructor Thomas** at the Book Room (2F) for a trophy.

### Snowboarding
A new course is added. Clearing it gives the **Skanda Gem**.

## Side Quests (Each gives Zemurian Ore Shard + 3,500 Mira + 4 AP)

<!-- checkpoint: side-quests-complete | Finale Side Quests Complete -->

### My Jormungand Don't Want None
- **Location:** End of East Celdic Highway 3 (northeast, where Point D used to be)
- **Boss: Jormungand** — HP: 172,254 (Normal). Weak to Earth/Fire. High Slash/Strike unbalance.
- **Strategy:** Canceler build prevents all boss turns. Faint status highly effective.

### Sachsen Violence
- **Location:** Sachsen Mountain Path 2 (northeast near fishing spot). Land Courageous on Sachsen Iron Mines.
- **Boss: Gespard** — HP: 178,653 (Normal). Very high physical defense. Weak to Earth.
- **Strategy:** Use arts for best damage. Boss casts arts frequently — impede and cancel them. Good for farming the Impede Arts trophy.

### Nord by Nord-east
- **Location:** Nord Highlands - Northeast (center area)
- **Boss: Glider Quaker** — HP: 139,380 (Normal). Lowest HP of the four but strongest attacks. Weak to Wind.
- **Strategy:** Thunder Wave deals massive AoE + Mute chance. Boss is very weak to Mute — silence it to disable attacks. Canceler build or full S-Craft burst can one-shot it.

### Ymir, Far, Wherever You Are
- **Location:** Ymir Valley - End (left side)
- **Boss: Sasquatch** — HP: 183,654 (Normal). Highest HP of the four. Buffs STR/DEF.
- **Strategy:** Similar to Gordi Schnarr G. Canceler strategy prevents all turns. Confuse ailment is effective if lacking Canceler setup.

### Hidden Quest: Absentee Father
- Accept from **Father Paulo** at Trista's Chapel. Visit priests in order:
  1. Celdic Chapel — **Zirbel**
  2. Bareahard Cathedral — **Amon**
  3. Legram Chapel — **Hamilcar**
  4. Roer Cathedral — **Homs**
  5. Ymir Chapel — **Bernard**
- **Reward:** Acala Gem, 4,500 Mira, 4 AP. Bring **Sara and Gaius** for extra dialogue.
- After completing, report quest on Courageous computer → reach 315 AP → **Gold Trophy** + **Lion Heart** accessory.

> 🏆 **Achievement: Honor Student** — Reach 315 AP. Requires completing all quests including this hidden one.

## Final Mission: Karel Imperial Villa

<!-- checkpoint: karel-imperial-villa | Karel Imperial Villa Cleared -->

**Machias is mandatory** for this section. Select your party and head to Karel Imperial Villa.

### Dungeon
- Fight Alliance Forces soldiers on approach and inside the villa
- **Treasure:** Claiomh Solarion (1F north), Seraphic Ring (1F south), U-Material ×10, Tear All Balm, Goldia Key (monster chest)
- Use the Goldia Key to unlock the southern door in Villa 3
- Heal at Orbment Station before the boss

### Boss: Altina & G-Zephyranthes
- **Altina HP:** 235,404 (Normal) — Low elemental/physical efficacy across the board
- **G-Zephyranthes ×2 HP:** 119,712 each — Equal elemental efficacy
- **Strategy:** Eliminate G-Zephyranthes first — they have high defense so use arts or S-Crafts. Altina casts **Black Barrier** (reflects one physical attack) and **Brionac** (laser, high damage + ADF down). At 40% HP she may use her S-Craft (~80% party HP damage). Use Emma's Crescent Shell/Mirror to reflect Brionac.
- **Tough enemies tip:** Sleipnirs and Altina have high DEF but low ADF — use Emma/Elliot with Aries MQ + Shadow Blade. Laura with Zemurian Ore weapon excels here.

### Grand Cordon Reward
If you collected all Medals from Princess Alfin, the Emperor awards the **Grand Cordon** accessory (+100 STR/DEF/ATS/ADF, +10% Critical Up).

## Infernal Castle

<!-- checkpoint: enter-infernal-castle | Enter the Infernal Castle -->

> **Save before entering.** This is the final dungeon — no return. Each stratum has a Zemurian Ore Shard (4 total = another ultimate weapon). Recommended: give weapons to your damage dealers (Elliot, Emma, Sara, Millium, or Gaius for arts builds).

**Key tip:** Keep **Laura and Emma** in active party throughout — they are your best damage dealers for the Cancelling strategy against each boss.

### Layer 1
- **Enemies:** Ebony Pawn, Blood Brand, Judge Pillar, Nebilim, Seraphic Gate, Tildawn, Ol-Gadia, Magic Knight Ashurei
- **Treasure:** Tear All Balm, Virgo Boots, Sepith ×500, Alfried's Armor (best male armor), Deus Gem
- Navigate using switches and ladders; activate switches to create bridges
- Bring **Laura** for character profile update at the boss

**Boss: Bleublanc & Duvalie (+ Balancing Clowns)**
- **Bleublanc HP:** 266,640 — **Duvalie HP:** 259,440 — **Balancing Clown HP:** 134,708 each
- **Strategy:** Kill **Bleublanc first** — he inflicts status effects and summons more Clowns. The Clowns can instantly heal bosses at low HP. Duvalie's S-Craft is a hard-hitting AoE; Bleublanc's reduces one member to 1 HP + Poison. Use Dark Matter to cluster enemies, then AoE with Altair Cannon. If you can reduce all enemies to ~80,000 HP, spam all 4 S-Crafts to finish.

<!-- checkpoint: 1st-stratum-cleared | 1st Stratum Cleared — Bleublanc & Duvalie Defeated -->

### Layer 2
- **Fie is mandatory** (also bring Alisa/Millium for extra dialogue)
- **Enemies:** Black Widow, Ramon, Tyrant, Magma Serpent, Crimsondile, Grim-Zanak, Abaddon, Reaver Garmr
- **Treasure:** Sirius Boots, Sepith Mass ×1000, Celestial Balm EX, Brahma Gem, Zeram Powder
- Puzzle: **Eye switches** — hit them with field action to remove vine barriers. Navigate by activating switches in sequence.
- Section 2 requires a character with **B rank Thrust proficiency** to hit a switch

**Boss: Xeno & Leonidas (+ Judgement Javelins)**
- **Xeno HP:** 271,808 — **Leonidas HP:** 276,768 — **Judgement Javelin HP:** 17,080 each
- **Strategy:** Kill **Xeno first** — once gone, Leonidas falls easily. Use AoE arts to clear Javelins. They use S-Crafts in succession — if both hit, it's game over. Give Jusis/Alisa the Artemis' Tear Lost Art to double HP for surviving S-Crafts. Impede messes up their turns. At ~90,000 HP, Rean's Termination Slash - Dawn (Ogre mode, max CP) can kill.

<!-- checkpoint: 2nd-stratum-cleared | 2nd Stratum Cleared — Xeno & Leonidas Defeated -->

### Layer 3
- **Enemies:** Black Ooze, Demonic Mirror, Demon Rider, Pit Demon, Freezing Knight, Nosferatu, Greater Devil
- **Treasure:** EP Charge IV, U-Material ×15, Celestial Armor, Mars Gem (monster chest with Greater Devil — scan it!), Loa Boots, Diabolos Gem
- Red mist passages — correct order: **left, right, middle, middle**
- Defeat two **Nosferatu** mini-bosses to create bridges
- Section 2 requires **B rank Strike** and **B rank Pierce** proficiency for switches

**Boss: McBurn (+ Elvavria R ×2)**
- **McBurn HP:** 436,864 (Normal) — **Elvavria R HP:** 151,625 each
- McBurn is immune to Fire, resistant to all other elements. Only ★☆☆☆ Slash unbalance; virtually immune to other physical types.
- **Key Moves:** S-Craft near battle start (unblockable, reduced by DEF Up), Sol Eruption Lost Art (must be cancelled), Purgatorial Flame (can be reflected but low damage), special Burn status (persists until cured or death)
- **Strategy:** This is the hardest layer boss. Speed is key — minimize McBurn's turns. Equip Impede 2 on all characters. Use Chrono Burst/Break for SPD manipulation. Lionheart and Grail Locket protect 2 characters from Burn. Cure others immediately. When HP reaches ~100,000, use Rean's Termination Slash - Dawn (Ogre mode) + Laura's Radiant Lion to finish.
- **Nightmare Tip:** Rean and Laura must be Level 125+ for combined S-Crafts to kill at the HP mark. Cook 15 Seasonal Hotpot beforehand.

<!-- checkpoint: 3rd-stratum-cleared | 3rd Stratum Cleared — McBurn Defeated -->

### Layer 4 (Highest Stratum)
- **Enemies:** Hades Pillar, Ragna Bezel
- **Treasure:** Chaos (armor), Zeram Capsule (final treasure — Treasure Hunter trophy!)
- Linear layout — spiral staircase. Collect the final **Zemurian Ore Shard** (4th total = another ultimate weapon from George)
- Use Orbment Station and Warp Point at the top to prepare

> 🏆 **Achievement: Treasure Hunter** — The Zeram Capsule is the final treasure chest needed for this trophy.

## Final Boss Gauntlet (5 Consecutive Rounds)

<!-- checkpoint: highest-stratum-cleared | Final Boss Gauntlet Begins -->

The final battle consists of **5 consecutive rounds** with two different teams. Party assignment:
- **Round 1:** Your regular team fights Crow & Vita
- **Round 2:** 1st Mech Battle (Valimar vs Ordine)
- **Round 3:** Reserve team fights Vermillion Apocalypse Phase 1
- **Round 4:** Main team fights Vermillion Apocalypse Phase 2
- **Round 5:** Final Mech Battle (Valimar + Ordine vs Vermillion Apocalypse)

All party members should be **Level 125+** for Nightmare. Prepare both teams with full gear, quartz, and items.

### Round 1 — Boss: Crow & Vita
- **Crow HP:** 381,290 (Normal) — Physical attacker. S-Craft: Deadly Cross (can be blocked with Platinum/Adamantine Shield)
- **Vita HP:** 350,090 (Normal) — Arts caster. S-Craft: Aria of the Abyss (devastating, no way to avoid except AT Delay)
- **Strategy:** Prioritize **Vita first** — she's more susceptible to AT Delay. Use Laura/Fie with Impede 2 to mess up Vita's arts. Use Overdrive immediately with Rean + Adamantine Shield character. Emma casts AoE arts (Claiomh Solarion/Altair Cannon/Maelstrom) to clear Crow's mines. Once Vita falls, Spirit Unification S-Crafts decimate Crow alone. Swap links constantly for Rush/Overdrive opportunities.
- **Accessories:** Grail Locket on Rean, Lionheart on Laura. Others prioritize Faint, Death, Confusion protection.

### Round 2 — Divine Knight: Valimar vs Ordine

<!-- checkpoint: divine-knight-ordine | Valimar vs Ordine Complete -->

- **Ordine HP:** 350,000 (Normal)
- **Stances and Weak Points:**
  - Idle Stance → Body: ★★☆☆, Head: ★☆☆☆, Arms: ★★★☆
  - Attack Stance ("Arghh!") → Body: ★★★☆, Head: ★★☆☆, Arms: ★☆☆☆
  - Attack Stance ("Come and get me!") → Body: ★☆☆☆, Head: ★★★☆, Arms: ★★☆☆
  - Attack Stance ("Prepare yourself!") → Body: ☆☆☆☆, Head: ☆☆☆☆, Arms: ★★★★ OR Body: ☆☆☆☆, Head: ★★★★, Arms: ☆☆☆☆
- **Attack Pattern:** Normal (weak: Arms) → Charge 1/Arc Slash (weak: Body) → Charge 2/Criminal Edge (weak: Head) → Charge 3/Chaos Saber (weak: Arms) → Charge 4/Blade Throw (weak: Head). After 50–60% HP depleted, pattern extends to include Charges 4 and 5.
- **Strategy:** Build CP for **Morning Moon** and counter. After 4 consecutive unbalances, Ordine uses a Follow-Up attack (a second stronger one comes after 5 unbalances in the fight's second half). Best supports: **Elliot** (healing), **Alisa** (CP Regen), **Sara** (STR Down on boss).

### Round 3 — Vermillion Apocalypse Phase 1 (Reserve Team)

<!-- checkpoint: final-boss-phase1 | Vermillion Apocalypse Phase 1 Defeated -->

- **HP:** 250,000 (Normal)
- **Suggested Party:** Elliot, Fie, Gaius, Machias, Sara
- **Strategy:** Boss has ALL-hitting attacks/arts that can cripple or kill weak members. It can cast Craft and Art Reflect barriers — use your weakest craft/art to dispel them. Elliot's Resonance Beat is crucial for party buffs. Use Seraphic Ring (on 2 characters) as main healing. Machias uses Burst Drive to manipulate turn order. When HP drops to ~60,000, spam S-Crafts to finish.
- **Cancelling Strategy:** Regroup entire party next to boss. Elliot uses Chrono Drive/Break to keep boss fully SPD debuffed. Fie/Sara use crafts with AT Delay chance. Only use Gaius S-Craft when boss is confirmed delayed.
- **This is the hardest of all 5 rounds.**

### Round 4 — Vermillion Apocalypse Phase 2 (Main Team)

<!-- checkpoint: final-boss-phase2 | Vermillion Apocalypse Phase 2 Defeated -->

- **HP:** 393,960 (Normal) + **Vermillion Weapons** (36,790 HP each)
- **Suggested Party:** Rean, Alisa, Laura, Jusis, Emma
- **Strategy:** Similar to Phase 1 but hits harder. Summons Vermillion Weapon adds instead of casting reflect. Has a super attack — keep fully healed. Use Platinum/Adamantine Shield since most attacks cannot be cancelled. S-Craft strategy: Use Spirit Unification + Radiant Lion combo repeatedly, recharge CP with Seasonal Hotpot. ~6–7 combos bring boss to HP threshold.
- **Cancelling Strategy:** A fully-decked Level 130 Rean can potentially prevent the boss from having a single turn. Rush boss with Rean and Laura every time you have 3 Bravery Points. Keep Alisa on Insight for CP dependency.

### Round 5 — Final Mech Battle: Valimar + Ordine vs Vermillion Apocalypse

<!-- checkpoint: final-boss | Final Mech Battle Complete -->

- **HP:** 430,000 (Normal)
- **Pattern:** Normal Attack (weak: Arms) → Charge 1 (weak: Body) → Charge 2 (weak: Head) → repeats
- **Strategy:** You team up with **Ordine** for this fight. No supports available — Guard is your only damage mitigation. Keep Ordine alive (if it falls, you lose crucial damage). Both mechs can combo together. Use offensive crafts to build Bravery Points fast, then unleash a Burst. After 50% HP, boss can Rush/Burst your party — be cautious as this can kill Ordine (lower defense).
- Attack patterns have distinct stances — establish a rhythm and the boss falls quickly. This is one of the easier mech fights despite the high HP.

> Your chosen bond partner affects the final cutscene and ending.

<!-- checkpoint: finale-complete | Finale Complete -->

Complete cooking rewards: give 22 superb dishes to **Monica** (→Impenetrable Shield), peculiar dishes to **Margarita** (→Chaos quartz), unique dishes to **Bridget** (→Revolution quartz), all 22 recipes discovered to **Ferris** (→Genesis MQ).
Complete all 5 stages of Sword/Shooting/Arts training modules on Courageous for master quartz rewards.
If 23 fish types caught, speak to **Annabelle** in Ymir Valley → catch **Arch Tyrant** → buy **Aeolus Gem**. Speak to **Kenneth** → **Orochi MQ** + **Sennin Gem**.

**Hidden Quest: Absentee Father** — Talk to **Father Paulo** in Trista Chapel. Visit priests in order: Celdic (Zirbel) → Bareahard (Amon) → Legram (Hamilcar) → Roer (Homs) → Ymir (Bernard). Bring Sara and Gaius for extra dialogue.

steps.text: Return to Courageous — use 4 Zemurian Ore Shards from quests to forge another ultimate weapon via George.
Begin **Final Mission** — **Machias is mandatory**. Select party and proceed to Karel Imperial Villa.

**BOSS: Altina (235,404 HP) + G-Zephyranthes ×2 (119,712 HP each)** — Kill G-Zephyranthes first (use arts/S-Crafts due to high DEF). Altina uses Black Barrier (reflects 1 physical) and Brionac (laser, ADF down). At 40% HP she uses S-Craft (~80% party HP). Reflect Brionac with Crescent Shell/Mirror.

steps.text: 🏆 **Treasure Hunter reminder:** The Infernal Castle has 4 Zemurian Ore Shards (one per layer) and the **Zeram Capsule** (final treasure for Treasure Hunter trophy). Open EVERY chest.

steps.text: ⚠️ **POINT OF NO RETURN:** Entering the Infernal Castle is final. Complete all Trista activities and Karel Imperial Villa first.
**Save before entering.** Keep a backup save outside the castle.
Clear **Layer 1** — collect Tear All Balm, Virgo Boots, Sepith ×500, Alfried's Armor, Deus Gem. Bring **Laura** for profile update.

**BOSS: Bleublanc (266,640 HP) & Duvalie (259,440 HP) + Balancing Clowns (134,708 HP)** — Kill Bleublanc first (status effects + summons Clowns). Clowns can instantly heal bosses at low HP. Use Dark Matter to cluster, then AoE. Bleublanc S-Craft reduces 1 member to 1 HP + Poison; Duvalie S-Craft is hard-hitting AoE. At ~80,000 HP each, spam all 4 S-Crafts.

Clear **Layer 2** with **Fie** (mandatory). Hit eye switches with field action to remove vines. Section 2 needs **B rank Thrust** proficiency. Collect Sirius Boots, Sepith Mass ×1000, Celestial Balm EX, Brahma Gem, Zeram Powder.

**BOSS: Xeno (271,808 HP) & Leonidas (276,768 HP) + Judgement Javelins (17,080 HP)** — Kill Xeno first (Leonidas falls easily alone). They use S-Crafts in succession — both hitting = game over. Use Artemis' Tear Lost Art to double HP. At ~90,000 HP, Rean Termination Slash - Dawn (Ogre mode) can kill.

Clear **Layer 3** — red mist passages correct order: **left, right, middle, middle**. Defeat 2 Nosferatu mini-bosses. Needs **B rank Strike** and **B rank Pierce** for switches. Scan the **Greater Devil** in Mars Gem monster chest! Collect EP Charge IV, U-Material ×15, Celestial Armor, Loa Boots, Diabolos Gem.

**BOSS: McBurn (436,864 HP) + Elvavria R ×2 (151,625 HP each)** — HARDEST LAYER BOSS. Immune to Fire. Uses S-Craft early (unblockable), Sol Eruption Lost Art (MUST cancel), special Burn status (persists until cured/death). Speed is key — Impede 2 on all, Chrono Burst/Break. Lionheart + Grail Locket protect 2 from Burn. At ~100,000 HP, Termination Slash Dawn + Radiant Lion to finish.
steps.note: Nightmare: Rean + Laura must be Level 125+. Cook 15 Seasonal Hotpot beforehand.

steps.text: Clear **Layer 4** (linear spiral staircase). Collect **Chaos** armor, **Zeram Capsule** (final treasure!), and last Zemurian Ore Shard. Forge final ultimate weapon from George.

**Round 1 — BOSS: Crow (381,290 HP) & Vita (350,090 HP)** — Focus **Vita first** (more susceptible to AT Delay). Overdrive immediately with Adamantine Shield. Emma uses AoE arts to clear Crow's mines. Vita S-Craft (Aria of the Abyss) is devastating — only AT Delay prevents it. Crow's Deadly Cross can be blocked with Platinum/A-Shield. Once Vita falls, Spirit Unification S-Crafts decimate Crow.
steps.note: Accessories: Grail Locket on Rean, Lionheart on Laura. Prioritize Faint/Death/Confusion protection.

steps.text: **Round 2 — DIVINE KNIGHT: Valimar vs Ordine (350,000 HP)** — Pattern: Normal (Arms) → Charge 1/Arc Slash (Body) → Charge 2/Criminal Edge (Head) → Charge 3/Chaos Saber (Arms) → Charge 4/Blade Throw (Head). After 50% HP, pattern extends. Build CP for Morning Moon. Best supports: Elliot (heal), Alisa (CP), Sara (STR Down).

**Round 3 — Vermillion Apocalypse Phase 1 (250,000 HP, Reserve Team)** — HARDEST ROUND. ALL-hitting attacks/arts. Casts Craft/Art Reflect barriers (dispel with weakest craft/art). Suggested: Elliot, Fie, Gaius, Machias, Sara. Use 2× Seraphic Ring for healing. Machias Burst Drive for turn manipulation. At ~60,000 HP, spam S-Crafts.

sections.title: Divertissement: Occupation of Crossbell
sections.content:
# Divertissement — Occupation of Crossbell

The Divertissement is a unique interlude chapter starring **Lloyd Bannings** and **Rixia Mao** from the Crossbell arc (Trails from Zero / Trails to Azure). Lloyd and Rixia must infiltrate **Geofront Sector E** to erase sensitive Crossbell citizen data before it falls into the wrong hands. This is a dungeon-focused chapter with no side quests.

<!-- checkpoint: divertissement-start | Divertissement Begins -->

## Party

You control only **Lloyd** and **Rixia** — a two-person party. No other members join.

> These characters have their own equipment, orbments, and craft sets separate from Rean's party. Familiarize yourself with their abilities.

### Key Abilities
- **Lloyd's S-Craft: Raging Sun** — Powerful AoE attack for clearing groups
- **Lloyd's Burning Heart** — Self-buff that boosts attack and speed
- **Rixia's True Falling Moons** — AoE attack that can inflict status effects including Freeze
- **Rixia's Crystal Flood** — Water-based art; spam during boss fights while Lloyd tanks

> ⚠️ **No shops are available during the Divertissement.** You must rely entirely on dungeon drops and chest items. Manage your resources carefully.

## Geofront Sector E

<!-- checkpoint: geofront-sector-e | Enter Geofront Sector E -->

The chapter takes place entirely within **Geofront Sector E**, an underground dungeon beneath Crossbell. There is no city exploration — you proceed directly into the Geofront.

### Treasure Chests (16 total)
Key items to look for:
- **Celestial Balm EX ×3** — Premium healing
- **EP Charge IV ×2** — Arts restoration
- **Grail Locket** — Powerful accessory
- **Seven Dragons Armor** — Top-tier armor
- **Bakuya** — Weapon
- **Strega-S** — Weapon
- **Emergency Puppet** — Auto-revive accessory
- **Zeus Gem** — Quartz
- **Strega-P** — Weapon
- **Pentagon** — Weapon (Lloyd)
- **Heavenly Robe** — Armor
- **Tear All Balm** — Full party heal
- **Zeram Capsule** — Stat boost

> Explore every side path to find all 16 chests. These items are your only source of upgrades.

### Enemy Types
Enemies in Geofront Sector E include:
- **Grass Drome / Giant Drome** — Standard melee enemies
- **Needle Rat** — Fast attackers
- **Metal Bat** — Durable physical enemies
- **Greedy Mosquito / Superior Mosquito** — Can drain HP/EP
- **Blood Monad** — Magic-based enemy
- **Torso RR** — Mechanical enemy
- **Spike Kraken** — Strong water-type enemy
- **Crystal Medusa** — Petrification attacks; high priority target

> Scan all new enemies with Battle Scope for Monster Notebook completion.

<!-- checkpoint: geofront-cleared | Geofront Sector E Cleared -->

## Boss: Rean Schwarzer & Altina Orion

<!-- checkpoint: boss-rean-altina | Boss: Rean & Altina -->

**The boss fight of the Divertissement pits Lloyd and Rixia against Rean and Altina.**

| Boss | HP (Normal) | Elemental Efficacy | Weaknesses |
|------|-----|-------------|------------|
| **Rean Schwarzer (Black-Haired Boy)** | 237,600 | All elements 100 | Pierce ★, Strike ★ |
| **Altina Orion (Black-Clad Girl)** | 235,575 | All elements 90 | Slash ★, Thrust ★ |

**Preparation:**
- **Formation (Tanking):** Lloyd at Top, Rixia on Back row corner. **Formation (Cancelling):** Both Front row.
- **Accessory:** Give Rixia the Last Resort Puppet since she is fastest.
- **Quartz:** Equip Zeus Gem and Impede 2 for AT Delay. Farm Impede 1-2, Action 3, Hit 2, HP 2, Attack 3 beforehand.
- **Links:** Lloyd–Rixia

**Strategy (Cancelling):**
1. Use **Burning Heart II** then **Raging Spin** to pull both bosses away from Rixia
2. Re-cast Burning Heart II before it expires to avoid the Faint side-effect
3. Rixia uses **True Falling Moons** to hit both bosses — Freeze is especially valuable for extra turns
4. **Kill Rean first** — he is the most dangerous. Altina's Black Barrier takes 2 hits to dispel but she reapplies it less often
5. When either boss drops to ~70,000 HP, spam S-Crafts to finish them off

**Strategy (Tanking):**
1. Use Burning Heart II + Raging Spin to keep both bosses away from Rixia
2. Alternate with **Brave Smash II** to try Sealing Rean
3. Rixia spams **Crystal Flood** — Freeze status provides breathing room
4. Keep HP near full at all times — both bosses can use S-Crafts without warning

> **Save before entering the boss area.** This fight can be punishing with only two characters and no shop access.

After victory, story scenes resolve the Crossbell situation and you return to Rean's party for the Epilogue.

<!-- checkpoint: divertissement-complete | Divertissement Complete -->

steps.text: Familiarize yourself with **Lloyd** and **Rixia's** abilities — they have unique equipment and crafts separate from Rean's party.
⚠️ **No shops are available during the Divertissement.** Rely on dungeon drops and chest items only. Manage resources carefully.
Place **Lloyd and Rixia in the back row** for better defensive positioning.

**Lloyd:** Use **Burning Heart II** for ATK/SPD buff (re-cast before expiry to avoid Faint). Save S-Craft **Raging Sun** for Sepith-Up turns and boss finishers. Don't skip the S-Craft animation during Sepith-Up turns.
**Rixia:** Use **True Falling Moons** for AoE damage with status chance (Freeze is ideal). Spam **Crystal Flood** during boss fights while Lloyd tanks.
Explore **Geofront Sector E** thoroughly — find all **16 treasure chests** including Celestial Balm EX ×3, Grail Locket, Emergency Puppet, Seven Dragons Armor, and Pentagon (Lloyd weapon).
Scan all enemies with Battle Scope: Grass Drome, Needle Rat, Metal Bat, Greedy Mosquito, Blood Monad, Torso RR, Spike Kraken, Giant Drome, Superior Mosquito, Crystal Medusa.
steps.note: Crystal Medusa can petrify — prioritize it in encounters.

steps.text: **Save before the boss area.** The fight is punishing with only two characters and no shop access.

**BOSS: Rean Schwarzer (237,600 HP) & Altina Orion (235,575 HP)** — Kill Rean first (most dangerous). Use Burning Heart II + Raging Spin to pull bosses. Rixia spams Crystal Flood/True Falling Moons for Freeze. Equip Zeus Gem + Impede 2 for AT Delay. Spam S-Crafts when a boss drops below ~70,000 HP.
steps.note: Both bosses can use S-Crafts without warning. Keep HP near full at all times.

sections.title: Epilogue: Winter's End
sections.content:
# Epilogue — Winter's End

The Epilogue wraps up the story and features the **Reverie Corridor** — a challenging multi-sector randomized dungeon inside the Old Schoolhouse. This is post-game content focused on powerful bosses, ultimate weapons, and final character moments.

<!-- checkpoint: epilogue-start | Epilogue Begins -->

## March 12 — Return to Thors

You regain control at **Thors Military Academy**. Explore the school and speak to NPCs to update character profiles before advancing.

**Missable Books:**
- **Imperial Chronicle Issue #7** — Purchase from the General Store at the Student Union Building. If you have obtained every book from earlier, you will get the Book Maniac trophy.
- **Decoding Report** — (Second playthrough only) Speak to Instructor Thomas after collecting all five Black Records Books.

**Character Profile Updates (March 12):**
Explore the school in this order:
1. Bridget, Hibelle, and Mint at the Music Room (Main Building 2F South)
2. Nicolas at the Home Economics Room (Main Building 2F Southeast)
3. Clara at the Art Room (Main Building 2F East)
4. Vice Principal Heinrich at Main Building 1F East Hallway
5. Principal Vandyck at the Principal's Office (Main Building 1F East)
6. Instructor Makarov and Vincent on the school Rooftop
7. Jusis, Paula, and Lambert at the Academy Field
8. Friedel and Alan at the Gymnasium Training Room
9. Engineering Building for a story event, then rear exit to the Hangar — speak to Valimar
10. Student Union Building — Ferris and Theresia at 1F, Fiedelio at Photography Club (2F)
11. Student Council Room to continue the main story

After the story event, you'll be at the **Class VII Dorm**. Speak to everyone (Sharon, Alisa, Celine, Elliot, Jusis, Monica, Machias, Instructor Sara) to update profiles, then head to your room to end the day.

> **Note:** If this is your second playthrough and you received the Decoding Report, open it from your inventory, then read all the Black Records.

## March 13 — Free Day

<!-- checkpoint: epilogue-quests | Epilogue Side Quests Complete -->

Read the task assignments. Report to Towa to claim quest rewards. Before starting quests, speak to NPCs for profile updates:
- Sariffa at Trista's Park
- Edel near the Gardening Shop
- Lotte near the Upper Class Dorm
- Munk by the Lower Class Dorm entrance, Klein inside
- Hugo at the Auditorium (southwest of Thors)
- Linde at Thors Garden (north end)
- Loggins at Student Union Building 1F
- Stefan at Chess Club (Student Union 2F), Beryl at Occult Research Club (2F)

### Side Quests

**Quest: Junk Wanted** — Client: Brandon (General Store)
Speak to Brandon at the general store. Visit Micht at the Pawn Shop, then Sara's room at the dorm, then Kirsche's Café to speak to Sara for the Carnelia books. Speak to Janitor Gyler at the main building entrance, Clara at the art room, Lambert at the Academy Field, then return to Micht and finally Brandon.
**Reward:** Food Ingredients, 3000 Mira, 1 + (1) AP

**Quest: Let's Talk Trista** — Client: Michael (Radio Trista)
Speak to Michael at Radio Trista (southwest of Trista). Talk to Old Man Abbot at Kirsche's Café, Tyzel near the General Store entrance, Lotte by the Upper Class Dorm, Vice Principal Heinrich at Main Building Faculty Lounge, and Monica at the Gymnasium Training Hall. Read the letter on the table at Radio Trista for bonus AP.
**Reward:** Celestial Balm EX ×3, 3000 Mira, 1 + (1) AP

**Quest: Angler Management** — Client: Kenneth (Trista's River)
Speak to Kenneth at Trista's River (northeast of town). Play the fishing mini-game until you catch a Noble Carp. Then use Kenneth to catch the Giant Swordtail.
**Reward:** Groundbait ×10, 3000 Mira, 1 AP

**Hidden Quest: Swimming Lessons: The Return** — Client: Instructor Neithardt
After finishing the three quests above, Neithardt will call you. Go meet him at the **Main Building Faculty Lounge**. Accept his request to participate in the swimming mini-game. Choose two opponents (one boy, one girl from Class VII) — this increases Link EXP with them. Press the button prompts when the rings are highlighted to increase swimming speed. Beating your opponent earns bonus AP.
**Reward:** Zeram Capsule, 300 Link EXP, 3000 Mira, 1 + (1) AP

**Story Quest: The Race to End All Races** — Client: Angelica/George
Head to the Engineering Building and speak to Angelica or George. Race against Angelica — hold accelerate, get ahead, and block her to maintain the lead. You can rematch if you lose.
**Reward:** Lightning Belt, EP Charge IV ×3, Engineering Building Key, 3000 Mira, 1 + (1) AP

**Quest: Class Warfare** [Required] — Client: Patrick
Talk to Patrick at the Academy Field. Fight 2v2 battles — select your best party member. Win all three fights for bonus AP. Includes trial chest bosses: Vandyck (HP: 221,940) and Beatrice (HP: 214,936). They are immune to status ailments — use AT Delay, buff up, and burst with S-Crafts/Overdrive.
**Reward:** Albion Garb, Tear All Balm ×3, Link EXP +200, 3000 Mira, 1 + (1) AP

### Collectibles
- **Imperial Chronicle Issue #7** — Buy from the Student Union General Store if not already purchased. Critical for the Lending Library achievement!
- All missing books can be purchased from **Keynes Bookstore**. Micht's Pawnshop has a chance of selling Gambler Jack II.

## Final Dungeon Preparation

After finishing the story quest, try moving to a random location for an event scene. Then go to the **Old School House** to continue.

**Before exploring the final dungeon:**
1. Speak to Elise to update her bio
2. Talk to Claire and Alfin for a short scene
3. Leave the final dungeon and visit: Makarov (Main Building 1F Faculty Lounge), Margarita (Home Economics Room 2F), Becky and Colette (Auditorium), Dorothee (Literature Club 2F), Rex (Photography Club 2F), Casper (Gymnasium Pool)
4. In Trista: Lotte by Upper Class Dorm entrance, Celestin inside Upper Class Dorm

**Hidden Quest: To Sharon, With Love** — Client: Anton (near Trista Station)
Make sure Sharon is NOT in your party. Speak to Anton. Talk to NPCs with green exclamation marks (Micht at Pawn Shop or Becky at Auditorium). Choose "Let's think of another idea" first, then speak to another NPC. For Micht choose "Brace for the Bracelet"; for Becky choose "Recommend the stone". Do NOT speak to Jane by the Gardening Shop (causes failure with only 1 AP).
**Reward:** Nine Lives Puppet, 3000 Mira, 1 + (2) AP

> **Note:** If this is your second playthrough and you've read all Black Records, speak to Instructor Thomas at the Main Building Rooftop for the Scholar of Truth trophy.

Report to Towa to claim all quest rewards before entering the final dungeon.

## Final Bonding Events & Last-Chance Collectibles

### Bonding Points (Final Opportunity)
You receive your **last Bonding Points** in the Epilogue. Spend them on the character you want as your ending partner:

- The character with the **highest total affection** across all Acts determines your final cutscene
- This is your absolute last chance to influence the ending
- **Save before spending** to see different endings

### Last-Chance Books & Recipes

> ⚠️ **FINAL CHECK:** Before entering the Reverie Corridor, verify you have collected ALL missable items:

**Books checklist:**
- All Gambler Jack II chapters (1-13 + Finale)
- All Gambler Jack Reprints (#1-#13 + Finale) — available from shops in each town visited
- All Imperial Chronicle issues (#1-#7)

> **Note:** Red Moon Rose is NOT a collectible in Trails of Cold Steel II (it was in the first game only). The Lending Library achievement in CS2 requires Gambler Jack II, Gambler Jack Reprints, and Imperial Chronicle issues.

**Recipes checklist:**
- All recipes from each town visited
- Check recipe list in Camp Menu — any gaps mean you missed one

> 🏆 **Achievement: Lending Library** — If you're missing ANY book, this is your last chance. Keynes Bookstore and Micht's Pawnshop sell missed issues.

> 🏆 **Achievement: Wartime Rationer** — Check the recipe menu. If you're short, revisit towns via Courageous before entering the corridor.

## Phantasmal Mirrors

**Phantasmal Mirrors** are available for 200,000 mira each from the Orbment Station at the dungeon entrance. These gender-specific accessories transform characters into guest fighters:
- **Azure Knight (Crow)** — Male mirror
- **Burning Bravery (Lloyd)** — Male mirror
- **Witch of the Abyss (Vita)** — Female mirror
- **Black Rabbit (Altina)** — Female mirror
- **Silver Moon Princess (Rixia)** — Female mirror

**Mirror Mechanics:**
- Special characters have NO status, orbment, or equip screens — you cannot change their loadout
- They only appear IN BATTLE, substituting the mirror-equipped character
- Their level and stats DEPEND on the equipped character's level
- All EXP and Link EXP goes to the character wearing the mirror
- Each special character grants permanent 10 CP Regeneration and Critical Up status (Ice Crown effect)
- Quartz sets include Lost Arts and Level 5 Master Quartz

## Reverie Corridor

<!-- checkpoint: reverie-corridor | Enter Reverie Corridor -->

The Reverie Corridor is a multi-sector randomized dungeon with elemental themes and powerful bosses.

### Structure
- **Four Sectors** themed to the basic elements: Earth (Yellow), Fire (Red), Water (Blue), Wind (Green)
- **Semi-Random Layout:** Sector order and layout changes EVERY TIME you leave and re-enter the Old Schoolhouse
- Enemies have resistances/weaknesses based on their sector's element
- At the end of every 4th floor, you fight a **Cryptid** boss
- **Floor 17:** True final boss

### Corridor Mechanics
- **ALL 18 playable characters** available (Class VII plus guests)
- **Triple Link EXP (×3)** after fights
- **Chest Respawn:** Treasure chests regenerate every time you leave and re-enter. Brown chests = Sepith/consumables, Red chests = accessories/Lv3 quartz, Monster chests = special quartz
- **Valimar** is available for all boss fights
- Enemies scale with sector position — Sector 1 has weak stunnable enemies, Sector 4 has tough enemies

### Zemurian Ore Shard System
- Each Cryptid boss drops **1 Zemurian Ore Shard** (4 per full run)
- **3 Shards = 1 Zemurian Ore** — used to forge ultimate weapons
- Multiple corridor runs required for full ultimate weapon set

### Tips for the Corridor
- **Grind as needed** — deeper sectors provide the best EXP in the game
- Keep equipment and quartz updated between runs
- Equip elemental resistance matching the current sector theme
- Sell all Sepith and spend Mira before finishing — saves NG+ points
- On 2nd playthrough: Defeating the final boss with a Phantasmal Mirror character unlocks a bonus scene

## Cryptid Bosses

Each sector ends with a Cryptid boss:

<!-- checkpoint: earth-lord-defeated | Earth Sector Cryptid Defeated -->

- **Earth Sector Cryptid** — Exploit wind-element weaknesses

<!-- checkpoint: water-lord-defeated | Water Sector Cryptid Defeated -->

- **Water Sector Cryptid** — Exploit fire-element weaknesses

<!-- checkpoint: fire-lord-defeated | Fire Sector Cryptid Defeated -->

- **Fire Sector Cryptid** — Exploit water-element weaknesses

<!-- checkpoint: wind-lord-defeated | Wind Sector Cryptid Defeated -->

- **Wind Sector Cryptid** — Exploit earth-element weaknesses

Each Cryptid drops a **Zemurian Ore Shard**. Use elemental counter-quartz and arts for each fight.

## Final Boss: Loa Luciferia

<!-- checkpoint: loa-luciferia | Loa Luciferia Defeated -->

After clearing all four sectors (Floor 17), face the true final boss.

### Final Boss: Loa Luciferia

| Stat | Value |
|------|-------|
| HP | 722,250 (Normal) |
| Adds | Sacred Order (HP: 73,360 each) |
| Immunity | AT Delay |

**Key Mechanics:**
- **Immune to AT Delay** — the canceler strategy won't work here
- Summons **Sacred Order** adds — destroy them quickly with AoE arts or they empower the boss
- Uses **S-Craft as opening move** and throughout the fight — leaves all hit characters at 1 HP AND removes status buffs (cannot be blocked with shields, but CAN be dodged with Insight)
- **Can absorb party members** — S-Break immediately if this happens
- Moves around the field if no character is beside him as bait
- Faster than your characters at all times

**Required Protections:** Dark Pendulum/Emblem, Vanish protection, Death protection, Stat Down protection

**Strategy — Baiting Approach:**
Use Fie/Millium/Altina/Lloyd as bait next to the boss. Cast Insight on them ASAP (S-Craft dodges). Maintain Spd +50% buff. Main damage dealer should be a mage (Vita, Emma, Elliot, Rixia).

**Strategy — S-Craft Burst:**
Open with Alfin's Sacred Circle, Jusis' Platinum Shield, or Adamantine Shield for protection. Overdrive to buff party with Insight on ALL members. Build CP to 100 and blast with S-Crafts.

**Recommended Characters:** Vita (best overall — regenerates HP/EP, natural Vanish resistance, Summon Grianos for status effects), Fie (evasion tank/bait), Alfin (Sacred Circle), Lloyd (Burning Heart II for speed), Laura/Rean (S-Craft damage with Ice Crown on 2nd playthrough)

> With Domination quartz and full buffs, S-Crafts can deal 180,000-350,000 damage.

<!-- checkpoint: corridor-complete | Reverie Corridor Complete -->

## Post-Corridor

Upon completion:
- Special cutscenes with characters based on bonding levels
- Final save available for NG+ data transfer
- Keep your save data for potential transfer to Trails of Cold Steel III
- The **Memories** option appears on the system menu, letting you rewatch movie scenes and the final bonding event

> **New Game+ unlocks after completing the Epilogue.** Your clear save carries over based on NG+ Point selections.

<!-- checkpoint: epilogue-complete | Epilogue Complete — Game Clear -->

steps.text: **FINAL BOSS: Loa Luciferia** (HP: 722,250, immune to AT Delay) — Summons Sacred Order adds (HP: 73,360 each). Uses S-Craft as opening move (1 HP + removes buffs, dodgeable with Insight). steps.text: **NG+ Bonus:** Defeating the final boss with a Phantasmal Mirror character active unlocks a bonus scene.
Create your **NG+ clear save** after completing the Epilogue. Keep your save data for potential transfer to Trails of Cold Steel III.

sections.title: New Game Plus & Cleanup
sections.content:
# New Game Plus & Cleanup

After completing the game, you unlock **New Game Plus**. You receive **5 NG+ Points** per completion to spend on carry-over bonuses (15 points total needed = 3 playthroughs to buy everything).

## NG+ Points System

| Carry-Over | Points |
|------------|--------|
| Link Levels & Overdrive Level (Rush/Burst from start) | 0 (free) |
| Character Level | 1 |
| Slot Level | 1 |
| Master Quartz Level | 1 |
| Mira & Sepith | 1 |
| Items (equipment, quartz, consumables, books — some event items excluded) | 1 |
| Notebook Data (battle, character, recipe, fishing, books) | 1 |
| Bath Towel Outfits | 1 |
| Academy-Issue Swimsuits | 1 |
| Stage & Other Outfits (includes Gaius' Nord clothes, etc.) | 1 |
| Bonus: 300,000 Mira + 3000 of Each Sepith | 2 |
| Bonus: Max Bonding Points on Free Days | 2 |

> **Tip:** Sell all Sepith and spend Mira before finishing — that way you don't waste a point on "Carry Over: Mira, Sepith."

## NG+ Exclusive Content

- **Black Records:** Five collectible books available only on 2nd+ playthrough. Collecting all five and showing them to Instructor Thomas unlocks the **Scholar of Truth** trophy.
- **Glacia Shrine:** Bonus optional dungeon with a super boss. Defeating it unlocks the **Ice Crown** accessory.
- **Phantasmal Mirror Bonus Scene:** Defeat the final boss with a Mirror character active on 2nd+ playthrough.

## NG+ Exclusive Achievements

> 🏆 **Achievement: Frozen Heart** — Start a New Game+ on Nightmare difficulty. Select Nightmare when prompted at the start of NG+. This stacks with Conquering Hero and Banisher of Nightmares if you haven't earned those yet.

> 🏆 **Achievement: Scholar of the Truth** — Collect all five Black Records (2nd playthrough), read them, then speak to Instructor Thomas at the Main Building Rooftop.

> 🏆 **Achievement: All Bonding Events** — View all bonding events. Requires at least 2 playthroughs since you cannot see all bonding events in a single run (limited bonding points per chapter). Use the "Max Bonding Points" NG+ bonus to see all events in fewer runs.

## NG+ Cleanup Checklist

Use NG+ to mop up any achievements missed on your first playthrough:

- **Lending Library**: Books do NOT carry over unless you buy the Items carry-over. Re-collect all volumes.
- **Wartime Rationer**: Recipe/Notebook progress carries over (if purchased). Cook any missing recipes.
- **The Reel Deal**: Fish progress carries over (if Notebook Data purchased). Catch any species you missed.
- **Intelligence Agent**: Profile progress carries over (if Notebook Data purchased). Talk to any NPCs you missed.
- **The Return of Rean QUARTZ-er**: Master quartz carry over (if purchased). Focus on any missed in one-time dungeons.
- **Cumulative combat trophies**: All combat counters carry over. Keep grinding S-Breaks, Rush, Burst, and Overdrive.
- **Face of the Enemy**: Battle notebook carries over (if purchased). Fight any missed monster types.

## Bonding Route Planning

With limited bonding points per chapter, plan your routes across 2+ playthroughs to cover all characters:

- **Playthrough 1**: Focus on Alisa, Laura, Fie, Emma, Jusis, Machias
- **Playthrough 2**: Focus on Elliot, Sara, Towa, Millium, Crow, and remaining events (use Max Bonding Points bonus!)

Note: Watching the Final Bonding event on December 30 and saving an extra file will update the system data to have the event unlocked in Memories.

<!-- checkpoint: ng-plus-start | Started New Game Plus -->
<!-- checkpoint: ng-plus-cleanup | Completed NG+ cleanup -->
